codes.INVITE_IDENTIFIER_MISMATCH: Aa invite bija email ke mobile number par moklaayu hatu.

codes.NETWORK_UNREACHABLE: Server sathe jodai shakayu nahi. Tamaru internet connection tapasine fari prayatna karo.
codes.ACCOUNT_SCHEDULED_FOR_DELETION: Aa account delete karva mate nirdharit chhe. Kayam mate dur thai jay te pehla tene pachhu melavva amaro sampark karo.

roles.title: Bhumikao ane parvangio
roles.subtitle: Tamara workspace ma kon shu access kari shake te nakki karo

designations.title: Hodda
designations.subtitle: Team sabhyo ne categorize karva mate custom hodda
designations.description: Team sabhyo ne categorize karva mate vaprata custom hodda umero. Permission bhumika thi alag.
designations.modalDescription: Tamari team sabhyo mate hodda umero, edit karo athva door karo.
designations.addPlaceholder: Da.t. Store Manager, Cashier, Security Guard
designations.duplicate: Aa hoddo pahelethi j astitvama chhe
designations.deleteConfirm: Shu tame kharekhar "{name}" kadhi nakhva mango chho? Aa hoddo dharavta halna team sabhyo tene rakhshe, parantu nava sabhyo mate te uplabdh rahese nahi.
designations.localeFallbackHint: Khali hoy tyare anya bhasha angreji par pachhi jaay chhe.
designations.customNoTranslate: Custom hodda jem dakhal karya hoy tem store thaay chhe ane translate thata nathi.
designations.renameCascadeBody: "{old}" nu naam badline "{new}" karvathi aa hoddo vaparta {count, plural, one {# team sabhya} other {# team sabhyo}} pan update thashe.
designations.renameCascadeNoMembers: Halma koi sabhya aa hoddo vaprtu nathi.
designations.renameSuccessToast: Naam badlayu. {count, plural, one {# sabhya} other {# sabhyo}} update thaya.
designations.deleteBlockedBody: {count, plural, one {# sabhya} other {# sabhyo}} haju pan "{canonical}" vapare chhe. Pahela temne farithi sompo athva door karo.
designations.deleteConfirmBody: "{canonical}" kadhi nakhvo chhe? Aa pachhu lavi shakase nahi.

employeeCode.title: Karmchari code settings
employeeCode.subtitle: Banavti vakhte team sabhyo ne aap-mele unique code sopo
employeeCode.description: Nava team sabhyo ne unique karmchari code kevi rite sopay e control karo. Code salary slip, bank report ane audit export par dekhay chhe.
employeeCode.noWorkspaceWarning: Karmchari code gothavva mate Workspace pasand karo.
employeeCode.permanentDesc: Ekvaar sopaya pachhi, sabhya no code edit kari shakato nathi. Chalu karta pehla format dhyan thi pasand karo.
employeeCode.adminRequiredTitle: Admin athva Malik access jaruri chhe
employeeCode.adminRequiredDesc: Karmchari code settings badalva mate tamare Admin athva Malik parvangi ni jarur chhe.
employeeCode.enableDesc: Sachavti vakhte dareak team sabhya ne aap-mele unique code sopo.
employeeCode.formatHelper: Upar na helper mathi token vaapri ne format banavo. Tema ek sequence token ({sequenceTokens}) hovu jaruri chhe. Tame type karo em niche nu preview live update thay chhe.
employeeCode.quickExamplesLabel: Zadpi udaharano - lagu karva click karo
employeeCode.prefixHelper: Tamara format ma {prefixToken} token ne badle chhe. Vadhu ma vadhu 16 akshar. Manya: A–Z, a–z, 0–9, hyphen, underscore
employeeCode.startingNumberTooltipP1: Code banavti vakhte vaaprvano pehlo sequence number.
employeeCode.startingNumberTooltipP2: Counter track kare chhe ke atyaar sudhi ketla code reserve thaya chhe. Ekvaar code sopai gaya pachhi, tame fakt sharuaat no number vadhari shako chho - vartmaan counter thi niche ghatadi shakta nathi.
employeeCode.startingNumberTooltipP3: Next bhaag batave chhe ke aagami nava sabhya ne barabar kayo sequence malshe.
employeeCode.counterTooltip: Atyaar sudhi reserve thayela kul code. Tame sharuaat no number aa value thi niche set kari shakta nathi.
employeeCode.nextTooltip: Aagami nava sabhya ne je sequence number malshe.
employeeCode.allowCustomDesc: Sabhya umerti vakhte Admin ne aap-mele banela code ne badalva do.
employeeCode.formatChangeWarning: Format badalva thi haal na sabhyo par asar thati nathi. Teo temna vartmaan code rakhshe. Nava sabhyo nava format no upyog karshe.
employeeCode.errorFormatNeedsSequence: Format ma ek sequence token ({#}, {##}, {###}, athva {####}) hovu jaruri chhe.
employeeCode.errorFormatChars: Format ma fakt akshro, sankhyao, underscore, hyphen, { }, ane # hoi shake chhe.
employeeCode.errorPrefixChars: Prefix ma fakt akshro, sankhyao, underscore, hyphen, { }, ane # hoi shake chhe.
employeeCode.errorStartingNumberRange: Sharuaat no number 1 ane 9,999,999 ni vachche hovo jaruri chhe.
employeeCode.errorStartingNumberTooLow: Sharuaat no number sauthi uncha haal na code (haal ma {currentMax}) karta vadhare hovo jaruri chhe. {nextValid} athva tethi vadhare set karo.
employeeCode.disableConfirmContent: Band karva thi form ane yaadi ma karmchari code chhupai jashe. Haal na code sangrahit raheshe ane pachhi thi fari chalu kari shakay chhe. Chalu rakhvu chhe?
employeeCode.backfillTitle: Haal na sabhyo mate code bharo
employeeCode.backfillConfirmTitle: Haal na sabhyo mate code banavva chhe?
employeeCode.backfillConfirmAssignTo: Jemni paase haju sudhi code nathi teva {count, plural, one {# sabhya} other {# sabhyo}} ne code sopo ({total} kul bin-archive sabhyo mathi).
employeeCode.backfillConfirmBullet1: Sakriya, nishkriya ane offboarding sabhyo no samavesh thay chhe.
employeeCode.backfillConfirmBullet3: Code jodavani tarikh na kram ma bane chhe.
employeeCode.backfillConfirmBullet4: Je sabhyo paase pehle thi j code chhe temne chhodi devay chhe.
employeeCode.backfillConfirmBullet5: Sopayela code kaymi chhe ane edit kari shakata nathi.
employeeCode.backfillDescription: {totalCount} {totalCount, plural, one {sabhya} other {sabhyo}} mathi {withoutCount} (sakriya, nishkriya ane offboarding) paase haju sudhi karmchari code {withoutCount, plural, one {nathi} other {nathi}}. Archive thayela sabhyo bakaat chhe. Code vartmaan format ane counter no upyog kari ne jodavani tarikh na kram ma bane chhe.
employeeCode.backfillConflictsLabel: {count, plural, one {# sabhya} other {# sabhyo}} ne code sopi shakayo nahi
employeeCode.backfillConflictsDesc: Aa sabhyo ne bharti vakhte duplicate code conflict aavyo. Fari bharo athva jaate code sopo.
employeeCode.leaveContent: Tamari paase karmchari code settings ma sachvya vagar na ferfaro chhe. Aa page chhodi ne temne rad karva chhe?

notifications.tileSubtitle: Members ne kyare ane kevi rite janava male te control karo
notifications.title: Suchnao
notifications.subtitle: Workspace na ferfaro vise members ne kyare ane kevi rite suchit karva te control karo.
notifications.noWorkspace: Notification settings gothavva koi workspace select karo.
notifications.readOnlyNotice: Notification settings badlava maate tamne workspace admin athva owner adhikaro joie.

permissionChanges.title: Permission update
permissionChanges.description: Jyare tamne member ni bhumika athva permission override badle, tyare nakkki karo ke temne suchna aapvi ke nahi.
permissionChanges.enabledHint: Band hoy tyare, permission ferfaro koi suchna vagar shantithi laagu pade chhe.

channels.inAppHint: Member ni bell icon ane dashboard ma suchna batavo.
channels.emailHint: Member na nodhayel email sarname suchna moklo.
channels.smsHint: Member na nodhayel mobile number par ek-line SMS moklo.
channels.smsCreditNote: Tamara workspace SMS credits vaapare chhe.

members.title: Sabhyo
members.subtitle: Aa workspace no access koni pase chhe te juo ane manage karo
members.ownerTip: Malik tarike, tame potane door kari shakta nathi. Pahela maliki transfer karo.
members.removeDescription: Teo tarat j aa workspace no access gumavshe.

invitations.title: Baki aamantrano
invitations.subtitle: Moklela pan haju svikaraya nathi teva aamantrano
invitations.cancelConfirmDescription: Aamantrit vyakti have jodai shakshe nahi.

invite.roleRequired: Krupa kari ne bhumika pasand karo
invite.noRolesError: Sabhyo ne aamantran aapta pehla krupa kari ne ek bhumika banavo
invite.noRolesHint: Sabhyo ne aamantran aapta pehla ochha ma ochhi ek bhumika banavo. Bhumika banavva mate "Bhumikao" vibhag ma jao.

changeRole.adminOption: Admin - Team, hajri ane pagar sambhali shake

bankAccounts.title: Payment khata
bankAccounts.subtitle: Pagar payment ma 'Payment From' tarike pasand kari shakay teva bank/UPI khata
bankAccounts.description: Je bank/UPI khata mathi pagar chukvay chhe te umero. Payment nondhti vakhte aa "Payment From" dropdown ma dekhashe.
bankAccounts.modalDescription: Pagar chukvva mate tamaro business vapre chhe te bank athva UPI khata umero. Payment nondhti vakhte aa "Payment From" field ma vikalp tarike dekhashe.
bankAccounts.addPlaceholder: Dakhla tarike, Business account - HDFC Bank
bankAccounts.duplicate: Aa khata nu naam pahelethi j chhe
bankAccounts.deleteConfirmDescription: "{label}" navi payment o mate uplabdh nahi hoy.

payroll.title: Payroll configuration
payroll.subtitle: Chalan, pagar chakra, feature toggles ane pagar malkhu

brandingSection.sectionDescription: Tamara workspace mate logo ane PDF export settings customize karo
brandingSection.brandingSubtitle: Logo, PDF header, watermark, ane footer details
brandingSection.exportSubtitle: Export PDF documents par shu dekhay te control karo

dangerZone.sectionDescription: Ultavi na shakay tevi kriyao je tamara Workspace ne kayam mate asar kare chhe
dangerZone.deleteDescription: Badha sabhyo, hajri record, pagar itihas ane settings kayam mate door kare chhe. Aa pachhu laavi shakatu nathi.
dangerZone.soleOwnerWarning: Tame aa Workspace na ekmatra Malik chho. Tene kadhi nakhvathi te kayam mate apraapya bani jashe.
dangerZone.typeToConfirmHint: Pushti karva mate tamne '{name}' type karvanu kahevama aavshe

deleteModal.title: Workspace kadhi nakho
deleteModal.permanentWarning: Aa kriya kaymi chhe ane pachhi laavi shakati nathi
deleteModal.nameMismatch: Naam mel khatu nathi. Aksharo na capitalization tapaso.
deleteModal.lastWorkspaceNotice: Aa tamaru ekmaatra workspace chhe. Tene delete karva thi tame biju workspace banavo athva join karo tya sudhi work area mathi sign out thai jasho (tamaru network chaalu rahese). Tame tene 30 divas ma pachhu melavi shako chho.

onboarding.welcomeTitle: ManekHR ma aap nu swagat chhe
onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Sharu karva mate chalo tamaro workspace ane profile set karie
onboarding.yourNameRequired: Krupa karine tamaru naam dakhal karo
onboarding.yourNameMinLength: Naam ochhama ochhu 2 akshar nu hovu joie
onboarding.workspaceNameMinLength: Workspace naam ochhama ochhu 2 akshar nu hovu joie
onboarding.workspaceNamePlaceholder: Dakhla tarike, Mari company, Design studio
onboarding.ownerInfo: Tamne pura niyantran sathe Malik tarike set karvama aavshe. Tame pachhithi team sabhyo ne aamantran aapi shako chho ane settings gothvi shako chho.

workspace.operationsFinanceSectionDescription: Shifts, payment khata ane payroll settings

accessDenied.title: Access nakari
accessDenied.description: Tamari pase workspace settings jovani permission nathi. Access mate vinanti karva tamara workspace malik no sampark karo.

setup.allSetBody: Workspace sampurna rite configure thayelu chhe.

appLockIdle.title: App Lock Timeout
appLockIdle.subtitle: Inactivity pachhi screen ketla samay ma lock thay
appLockIdle.description: Koi activity na male tyare app screen lock kare te pehla ketlo samay raah jue te pasand karo. Aa aa workspace na badha members ne lagu thay.
appLockIdle.defaultHint: Aa default timeout chhe. Save karva thi custom override clear thashe.

recovery.sectionDescription: Chhella 30 divas ma tame delete karel workspace pachhu melvo
recovery.title: Tajetar ma delete karela
recovery.subtitle: Delete karela workspace 30 divas sudhi pachha melvi shakay chhe. Tya bad, ene pachha melva support no sampark karo.
recovery.loading: Delete karela workspace tapaasi rahya chhie...
recovery.empty: Pachhu melva mate kai nathi. Tame delete karela workspace ahi 30 divas sudhi dekhaashe.
recovery.loadFailed: Delete karela workspace load kari shakaaya nahi
recovery.daysLeft: {count, plural, one {# divas baki} other {# divas baki}}
recovery.windowExpired: Aa workspace 30 divas karta vadhare samay pahela delete thayu hatu ane have ahi thi pachhu melvi shakaashe nahi. Ene pachhu melva support no sampark karo.
recovery.confirmDescription: Aa workspace ne ena badha member ane record sathe pachhu lave chhe. Suraksha mate, kiosk ane device token tame fari set na karo tya sudhi bandh rahese.

leave.confirmDescription: Tame turat ja aa workspace no access gumaavasho. Maalik tamne pachhi thi fari aamantrit kari shake chhe.

rehire.noticeTitle: Aa vyakti ahi pahela member hati
rehire.noticeRemovedOn: Emne {date} na roj dur karvaama aavya hata. Fari umervaathi emno halno record pachho aave chhe.
rehire.noticeDeclinedOn: Emne agau {date} na roj aamantran nakaaryu hatu. Fari umervaathi emno halno record pachho aave chhe.
rehire.noticeGeneric: Emni ahi agau ni sadasyata hati. Fari umervaathi emno halno record pachho aave chhe.

connectMode.sidebarComingSoon: Connect na vadhu tools tunk samay ma aavi rahya chhe.
connectMode.homeTitle: Tamaru industry network tunk samay ma aavi rahyu chhe
connectMode.homeBody: Connect e textile trade mate nu marketplace, jobs ane professional network chhe. Te hamna taiyaar thai rahyu chhe. Tunk samay ma tame ahithi j kaam shodhi shakso, kushaal lokone kaame raakhi shakso, sellers shodhi shakso ane tamari business presence vadhari shakso.
connectMode.entryErrorBody: Connect load karti vakhte kainck khotu thayu. Aa saamanya rite asthaayi hoy chhe. Thodi var ma fari prayatna karo.
connectMode.notFoundBody: Tame je page shodhi rahya cho te astitvama nathi athva khasedvama aavyu chhe.

errorPages.title: Page madyu nathi
errorPages.body: Tame je page shodhi rahya cho te astitvama nathi athva khasedvama aavyu chhe.

invitations.pageSubtitle: Tamne mokeli aamantran ane tame mokleli aamantran badhi workspace mate ahin dekhashe.
invitations.loadFailed: Aamantran load nahi thai. Fari prayatna karo.
invitations.declineTooltip: Aa aamantran naa karo. History ma move thai jase.
invitations.resendTooltip: Aamantran fari moklo. Link rotate thase.
invitations.resendUnavailable: Resend faqt team member sathe linked invites mate available chhe.
invitations.cancelTooltip: Aa pending invite cancel karo. Invitee accept nahi kari shake.
invitations.cancelUnavailable: Cancel faqt team member sathe linked invites mate available chhe.
invitations.cancelConfirmContent: {identifier} ne mokeli link kaam karva nahi sake. Pachi fari invite kari shako.
invitations.cancelFailed: Cancel nahi thayu. Fari prayatna karo.
invitations.acceptFailed: Aa aamantran accept nahi thayu. Link expire thai gayi hashe athva cancel.
invitations.declineFailed: Naa nahi thayu. Fari prayatna karo.
invitations.pendingEmptyDesc: Jyare koi tamne workspace ma invite karshe, ahin dekhashe.
invitations.sentEmptyDesc: Team page mathi member invite karva par ahin dekhashe.

config.title: Raja na prakar
config.subtitle: Tamara workspace nu raja catalogue nakki karo - pagari ane binpagari prakar, te kevi rite jama thay, ane varsh na ant e shu thay.
config.loadError: Raja na prakar load kari shakaya nahi.

accessDenied.title: Access nakari
accessDenied.message: Tamari pase raja na prakar manage karva ni parvangi nathi. Access mate tamara workspace malik no sampark karo.

config.emptyTitle: Haju koi raja no prakar nathi
config.emptySub: Balance, jama ane arjio track karva nu sharu karva mate ek raja no prakar banavo.
config.showInactive: {n, plural, one {# archive karel prakar} other {# archive karel prakar}} batavo
config.reactivated: Raja no prakar fari chalu thayo
config.deactivateDesc: Te navi arjio mathi gayab thai jay chhe. Halna balance, khatavahi entries ane juni vinanti o rakhvama ave chhe. Tame tene koi pan samay e fari chalu kari shako chho.

card.accrualNone: Jama nahi - manually athva comp-off dwara jama
card.yearEndLapse: Vaparaya vagar ni raja samapt thay
card.floorWarn: Hakdari kanooni laghuttam karta ochhi chhe
card.systemTip: System raja na prakar archive kari shakata nathi.

editor.systemLockedNotice: Aa system raja no prakar chhe. Fakt tenu naam, anuvaad ane rang badli shakay chhe.
editor.sectionIdentityHint: Aakhi app ma dekhato code, naam ane rang.
editor.codeHint: Aa workspace mate anany, tunko uppercase code. Te pachhi thi badli shakato nathi.
editor.codePattern: 2–12 akshar ke ank, akshar thi sharu thata
editor.localeHint: Anuvaad vaikalpik chhe - jya anuvaad na hoy tya Angreji naam vaparay chhe.
editor.sectionBehaviourHint: Raja pagari chhe ke kem ane te kevi rite arji kari shakay.
editor.isPaidHint: Pagari raja thi pagar kapato nathi. Binpagari raja e pagar-nuksaan ni kapaat chhe.
editor.unitHint: Sabhyo adhha divas ni arji kari shake ke kem.
editor.maxPerRequestLabel: Darek arji dith vadhuma vadhu divas
editor.maxPerRequestHint: Ek arji par ni upli maryada. Koi maryada na hoy to khali rakho.
editor.sectionStatutoryHint: Aa raja je kayda par aadharit chhe - niche-laghuttam salah chalave chhe.
editor.floorAlert: Aa hakdari varshe {entitlement} divas thay chhe - {basis} na suchak nyuntam {floor} thi ochhi. Sachvta pehla tapaso.
editor.sectionAccrualHint: Varsh daramyan balance kevi rite jama thay chhe.
editor.annualQuantityHint: Aakhi hakdari varsh ni sharuaat ma jama thay chhe.
editor.rateHint: Cap sudhi pohchay tya sudhi darek samaygale jama thay chhe.
editor.proRateHint: Samaygala ni vachche jodanar sabhya ne pramansar jama male chhe.
editor.accrualCapHint: Vadhuma vadhu jetlu ekthu thai shake. Cap na hoy to khali rakho.
editor.eligibleAfterHint: Aa raja uparjit thavanu sharu thay te pehla sabhye puri karvani seva-avadhi.
editor.sectionYearEndHint: Varsh band thay tyare na vaparayel balance nu shu thay chhe.
editor.carryForwardHint: Aavta varsh ma lai jai shakay teva diviso. 0 etle kai aagal jatu nathi.
editor.lapseExcessHint: Carry-forward cap upar nu badhu japt thay chhe.
editor.encashableHint: Na vaparayel raja varshante ane full-and-final settlement ma chukvi shakay chhe.
editor.encashmentCapHint: Vadhuma vadhu jetla divas encash thai shake. Cap na hoy to khali rakho.
editor.sectionCompOffHint: Raja na divase ke saptahik raja e kaam karine kamayel comp-off prakar tarike aane chihnit karo.
editor.isCompOffHint: Fakt manjur comp-off vinanti dwara, samapt thanar lot ma jama thay chhe.
editor.validityDaysHint: Kamayel comp-off lot samapt thay te pehla ketla samay sudhi vapari shakay chhe.
editor.sectionApplicabilityHint: Aa raja no prakar kone mate uplabdh chhe.
editor.genderHint: Koi ling sudhi maryadit karo - da.t. prasuti ke pitrutva raja.
editor.minTenureHint: Aatla divas ni seva puri karya pachhi j sabhyo arji kari shake chhe.

accrual.title: Uparjan
accrual.body: Aa raja no prakar balance ma kevi rite jama thay chhe - varsh ma ek vaar pahelethi aapvama aave, varsh daramyan nakki dare dhime dhime uparjit thay, athva bilkul uparjit na thay (manually athva comp-off dvara jama).

statutory.title: Vaidhanik aadhar
statutory.body: Aa raja no prakar je shram kayda sathe joday chhe. Te salahkari nyuntam-hakdari tapas chalave chhe - udaharan tarike Factories Act athva Shops & Establishments Act. "Svaichchhik" etle prakar company niti chhe, koi vaidhanik floor nathi.

yearEnd.title: Varshante vyavastha
yearEnd.body: Raja nu varsh band thay tyare vaparya vagar na balance nu shu thay chhe - nakki maryada sudhi na divas aagla varsh ma lai jao, vadharanu lapse thava do, athva tene encashment tarike chukvi do.

approvals.title: Raja Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Workspace ma raja ane comp-off requests ni review karo ane nirnay lo.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: Tamari pase raja approvals jovani parvangi nathi. Access mate tamara workspace malik no sampark karo.

approvals.emptySub: Aa filter sathe atyare kai mel khatu nathi.

lwp.title: LWP - Pagar vagar ni raja
lwp.body: Vinanti ma na eva divaso je pagari baki ma thi aavri levata nathi. Te raja tarike manjur to thay chhe pan binpagari hoy chhe, etle payroll te samaygala mate temni kapaat kare chhe.

retroactive.title: Backdated vinanti
retroactive.body: Aa vinanti evi tarikhone aavri le chhe je pahelethi j viti gai chhe. Te Leave Settings ma set kareli back-dating window ma manya chhe, ane ahin flag karel chhe jethi manjur karnar tene vadhu dhyan thi joi shake.

chain.title: Manjuri chain
chain.body: Manjur karnar ni krambaddh yaadi jema thi aa vinanti pasar thay chhe. Darek stare manjuri malvi jaruri chhe te pachhi j aagal vadhe chhe; koipan stare nakar vinanti roki de chhe. "Aapmele manjur" etle koi manjuri chain set karel nathi.

settings.title: Raja Settings
settings.subtitle: Approval workflow gothavo ane approver delegations manage karo.
settings.loadError: Raja settings load kari shakaya nahi.

accessDenied.title: Access nakari
accessDenied.message: Tamari pase raja settings manage karvani parvangi nathi. Access ni vinanti karva tamara workspace malik no sampark karo.

settings.workflowDesc: Raja ane comp-off vinantio kon review kare chhe, ane ek ubhi thay tyare lagu thata niyamo.
settings.approverChainHint: Vinantio aa approvers dwara kram ma jay chhe. Khali chain darek vinanti aapoaap manjur kare chhe.
settings.noApprovers: Koi approver nathi - vinantio submit thata j aapoaap manjur thay chhe.
settings.sandwichHint: Chalu hoy tyare, raja na gala ma aavta raja no divas ane saptahik rajao pan ganay chhe.
settings.retroHint: Bhutkal ni tarikh ni raja vinanti ketli pachhal sudhi pahonchi shake.
settings.maxAttachHint: Ek vinanti sathe sabhya vadhuma vadhu ketli file jodi shake.
settings.delegDesc: Approver chokkas gala mate potano approval adhikar koi delegate ne sopi shake chhe - da.t. teo bahar hoy tyare.
settings.revokeConfirmDesc: Delegate turat j tamara vati kaam karva ni kshamta gumave chhe.
settings.createHint: Tame tamari potani manjuri ni satta delegate kari rahya chho. Delegate aa window daramiyan jya tame approver chho te requests par kaam kari shake chhe.
settings.reasonPlaceholder: Vaikalpik - dakhla tarike annual leave cover

sandwich.title: Sandwich raja
sandwich.body: Chalu hoy tyare, be raja na divaso vacche aavto raja no divas ke saptahik raja pan raja tarike ganay chhe. Band hoy tyare, fakt kharekhar na raja na divaso j balance mathi katay chhe.

delegation.title: Approver delegation
delegation.body: Ek nishchit window mate approver ni leave-approval farjo asthayi rite bija user ne sopo - jyare approver pote raja par hoy tyare upyogi. Window puro thatá delegation aapmele samapt thai jay chhe.

balances.title: Raja baki
balances.subtitle: Darek sabhya ni varsh mate ni uparjit, vaprayel ane uplabdh raja - sathe manual sudhara.
balances.loadError: Raja baki load kari shakai nahi.

accessDenied.title: Access nakari
accessDenied.message: Tamne raja baki jovani parvangi nathi. Access mate tamara workspace malik no sampark karo.

balances.emptySub: Raja uparjit thay etle baki dekhashe. Aagla uparjan run pachhi fari tapaso.
balances.qtyHint: Dhan mulya divas jama kare chhe; run mulya baad kare chhe. Adhha divas manya chhe.
balances.qtyRequired: Shunya sivay no sudharo dakhal karo.
balances.reasonPlaceholder: Aa sudharo kem karvama aave chhe - khatavahi par nondhay chhe
balances.reasonRequired: Darek sudhara mate karan jaruri chhe.

opening.title: Sharuati baki
opening.body: Pachhla raja varsh mathi aa varsh ma lavel baki - darek raja na prakar na varsh-ant na carry-forward niyam mujab maryadit.

credited.title: Jama
credited.body: Aa varsh daramyan baki ma umerayel divas - uparjan run, agau thi varshik grant, athva manjur comp-off dwara.

pending.title: Baki
pending.body: Submit thayel pan haju manjur na thayel raja ni arjio dwara rokayel divas. Teo baju par rakhay chhe jethi uplabdh aankdo vadhare na batavay.

adjustment.title: Manual sudharo
adjustment.body: Khatavahi par sidho nondhayel sudharo. Dhan mulya divas jama kare chhe, run mulya baad kare chhe. Darek sudharo audit mate karan sathe nondhay chhe.

calendar.title: Kon raja par chhe
calendar.subtitle: Aakhi team ni manjur thayeli raja no mahina-war dekhav, sathe raja na divaso pan batavela chhe.
calendar.loadError: Raja nu calendar load thai shakyu nahi.

accessDenied.title: Access nakarel
accessDenied.message: Tamari pase raja nu calendar jovani parvangi nathi. Access mate tamara workspace malik no sampark karo.

calendar.emptyTitle: Aa mahine koi raja par nathi
calendar.emptySub: Pasand karela mahina ma koi manjur thayeli raja aavti nathi.

legend.title: Calendar kevi rite vanchvu
legend.body: Darek rangin choras manjur thayeli raja no ek divas batave chhe, je raja na prakar pramane rangayelo chhe. Aacho choras adadho divas chhe; ghatt choras aakho divas chhe. Chhayela column raja na divaso ke athvadik raja chhe. Ahi na raja na divaso ma pagari divaso ane binpagari divaso (LWP) banne aave chhe - eva divaso ke je pagari baki ma aavri levata nathi, je payroll kaapi le chhe.

me.title: Mari Raja
me.subtitle: Tamari raja baki, arjio ane itihas.
me.loadError: Tamari raja load kari shakai nathi.
me.selfApplyDisabledNote: Tame raja ni arji kari shako chho, pan aa workspace mate atyare jate raja levani suvidha band chhe. Ene chalu karva admin ne kaho, Workspace, Attendance settings hethal.
me.noBalancesSub: Tamne raja jama thay etle baki ahin dekhashe.

noActivity.title: Haji koi raja ni pravrutti nathi
noActivity.subtitle: Tamari raja balance ane arjio ahin dekhase.

me.historyEmptySub: Tame arji karo etle tamari raja ni vinantio ahin dekhashe.
me.cancelConfirmDesc: Aa baki vinanti rad thai jashe. Tame game tyare fari arji kari shako chho.
me.withdrawConfirm: Aa manjur thayel raja pachhi khenchvi?
me.withdrawConfirmDesc: Manjur thayel raja pachhi feravay chhe ane divaso tamari baki ma pachha ave chhe.

drawer.previewZero: Aa range ma koi charge thay teva kaam na divaso nathi - te sampurnpane raja na divaso athva saptahik raja par aave chhe.
drawer.previewLwpWarn: {n, plural, one {# divas binpagari raheshe} other {# divaso binpagari rahesh}} - tamari pagari baki sampurn request cover karti nathi.

lwp.title: LWP - Leave Without Pay
lwp.body: Request na e divaso je pagari baki ma thi cover thata nathi. Te raja tarike manjur to thay chhe pan binpagari hoy chhe, etle payroll te samaygala mate teમની kapaat kare chhe.

halfDay.title: Adadho divas
halfDay.body: Divas na matra ek bhag mate raja lo. "Pahelo adadho bhag" savar cover kare chhe, "bijo adadho bhag" bapor - dareક balance same 0.5 divas ganay chhe.

leaveType.title: Raja no prakar
leaveType.body: Raja nu karan - dareક prakar potana baki ma thi le chhe. Raja na divase athva saptahik raja e kaam karine kamayelo samay vaparva mate "Comp-off" pasand karo; te pahela My Comp-off heth claim karo.

compOff.title: Mari valtar raja
compOff.subtitle: Raja na divaso ane saptahik raja ma kaam karva badal tame melveli valtar raja.
compOff.loadError: Tamari valtar raja load kari shakai nahi.

accessDenied.title: Access nakari
accessDenied.message: Tamne valtar raja no daavo karva ni parvangi nathi. Access mate tamara workspace malik no sampark karo.

compOff.selfClaimDisabledNote: Tame valtar raja no daavo kari shako chho, pan aa workspace mate atyare self-service raja band chhe. Tene chalu karva mate Workspace, Hajri settings hethal admin ne kaho.
compOff.statExpiringSoon: 14 divas ma samapt thai rahi chhe
compOff.useHint: Valtar raja vaparva mate, Mari Raja par jao, raja ni arji karo, ane Comp-off prakar pasand karo.
compOff.lotsEmptySub: Daavo manjur thaya pachhi valtar raja ahin dekhay chhe.

lots.expiresInDays: {n, plural, one {# divas ma} other {# divas ma}}

compOff.historyEmpty: Koi valtar raja na daava nathi
compOff.historyEmptySub: Tame daavo submit karsho etle tamara valtar raja na daava ahin dekhashe.
compOff.cancelConfirmDesc: Aa baki valtar raja no daavo rad thai jashe. Tame game tyare fari daavo kari shako chho.
compOff.claimed: Valtar raja no daavo submit thayo

drawer.dateHint: Tame kharekhar kaam karyu hoy tevo raja no divas ke saptahik raja pasand karo. Tamaro manjur karnaar darek daavo chakase chhe.
drawer.dateRequired: Tame je divase kaam karyu te tarikh pasand karo.
drawer.reasonPlaceholder: Vaikalpik - tamara manjurkarta mate tunki nondh

compOff.title: Valtar raja (comp-off)
compOff.intro: Pagari raja no ek divas je karmchari, schedule na hoy teva divase - jaher raja ke saptahik raja e - kaam karine kamay chhe, tena badle vadharano pagar levana badle.
compOff.howTitle: Aa kevi rite kaam kare chhe
compOff.step1: Karmchari jaher raja ke saptahik raja e kaam kare chhe.
compOff.step2: Teo ahin valtar raja no claim kare chhe, je divase kaam karyu te tarikh pasand karine.
compOff.step3: Manager claim ni samiksha kare chhe ane manjur kare chhe.
compOff.step4: Manjur thayela divaso valtar raja na tarikhvala "lot" tarike jama thay chhe.
compOff.step5: Divas raja leva mate, karmchari My Leave ma "Comp-off" prakar sathe arji kare chhe - vaparya vagar na divaso lot samapt thay tyare samapt thai jay chhe.

lot.title: Valtar raja no lot
lot.body: Darek manjur thayelo claim potano lot bane chhe - nishchit samapti sathe valtar raja na divaso nu parcel. Lot sauthi juno-pahela vaparay chhe, jethi samapti ni najik na divaso nava karta pahela vaparay.

expiry.title: Lot samapti
expiry.body: Valtar raja hamesha mate raheti nathi - darek lot kamaya pachhi nishchit sankhya na divaso ma samapt thai jay chhe. Lot ni samapti pahela tame je divaso vaparta nathi te japt thai jay chhe.

holidays.title: Raja Vyavasthapan
holidays.subtitle: Karyasthal ni rajao ane tahevaro bin-karyakari divas tarike chihnit.

shifts.subtitle: Karyasthal nu shift catalog. Members potani assigned shift ne team ane attendance views ma jue chhe.

shifts.deleteFailed: Shift kadhi nakhi shakai nahi. Fari prayas karo.

empty.title: Koi shift gothveli nathi
empty.subtitle: Shift timings gothvo jethi attendance, payroll, ane team assignment jaane ke darek member kyare kaam kare chhe.

filtered.title: Aa filter ne mel khati koi shift nathi
filtered.sub: Vistrut drashya mate type chip badlo athva filter saaf karo.

typeHint.fixed: Standard shuru ane khatam thavano samay. Late aavavu ane vahela jaavu track thay chhe.
typeHint.flexi: Koi fixed timing nathi. Divas nu mulyankan kul kaam na kalak ne neeche aapelaa jaruri kalak sathe sarkhavi ne thay chhe.
typeHint.split: Ek divas ma kai check-in ane check-out blocks (jeva ke service ma dophar no break).
typeHint.break: Single check-in ane check-out; break punches kaam na samay mathi badbaki kari deva ma aave chhe.

deleteConfirm.title: Aa shift kadhi nakhvi?
deleteConfirm.description: Aa karyasthal catalog mathi shift dur kare chhe. Aa shift par je members chhe teone fari thi assign karva padshe.

drawer.requiredHoursTooltip: Member ne present mark karva mate ketla kul kalak kaam karvu jaruri chhe. Khali rakhva par 8-kalak no default use thashe.
drawer.graceTooltip: Shuru thavana samay pachhi ketli minute sudhi check-in late nathi maanva ma aavto.
drawer.halfDayTooltip: Jo member aa ketli minute karta vadhare late hoy to divas ne half-day mark karva ma aave chhe.
drawer.policyTooltip: Aa shift mate attendance kai policy thi score thashe. Khali rakhva par karyasthal default policy vaprashe.

attendance.title: Hajri

errors.MEMBER_OFFBOARDED: Aa sabhya ne dur karvama aavyo chhe. Temni hajri fakt vanchva mate chhe ane kanuni record mate rakhel chhe.
errors.ATTENDANCE_SELF_EDIT_BLOCKED: Tame tamari pote ni hajri mark ke edit kari shakta nathi. Workspace malik athva bija manager ne kaho.
errors.SELF_PUNCH_DISABLED: Aa workspace mate jate check in band chhe. Tene chalu karva admin ne kaho.
errors.KIOSK_PERIOD_CLOSED: Aa samaygala ni hajri bandh chhe. Krupa kari tamara supervisor no sampark karo.
errors.PAYROLL_LOCKED: Aa samay-gala mate payroll generate thai gayu chhe etle hajri lock chhe.
errors.FUTURE_DATE: Tame bhavishya ni tarikh mate hajri mark kari shakta nathi.
errors.generic: Kainck khotu thayu. Krupa kari fari prayas karo.

myAttendance.tapDayHintRaise: Tamara time jova athva sudharo karva koi pan divas par tap karo.

grid.subtitle: Mahina ni ek najar ma hajri grid - darek sabhya, darek divas.

grid.emptySub: Aa shodh sathe koi sabhya mel khato nathi.

livePresence.loadError: Live hajri load thai shaki nahi.
livePresence.emptySub: Aa view sathe koi sabhya mel khato nathi.

absencePatterns.title: Gerhajari ni pattern
absencePatterns.subtitle: Aadatgat gerhajari shodhva mate Bradford-shaili nu scoring ane var na aadhare grouping.
absencePatterns.loadError: Gerhajarini pattern load thai shaki nahi.
absencePatterns.advisoryNote: Matra salahkari. Aa samiksha mate gerhajari na pattern darshave chhe ane pagar ke hajri sthiti kyarey badaltu nathi.
absencePatterns.emptyTitle: Aa samaygala ma koi gerhajari nathi
absencePatterns.emptySub: Pasand karela pachhla samaygala ma koi sabhya gerhajar mark thayel nathi. Lambo samaygalo ajmavo.

bands.title: Bradford bands
bands.tooltipBody1: Bradford Factor = spell² × gerhajar divaso. Band e UK-mool ni HR pratha ma vaparata salahkari threshold chhe.
bands.tooltipBody2: Aa band ManekHR ma kyarey aapmele kriya chalu karta nathi. Ene shist-bhang na trigger tarike nahi, pan manager ni vaatchit mate na sanket tarike vaapro.

table.title: Dhyan rakhva jevi pattern
table.searchEmptySub: Aa shodh sathe koi sabhya mel khato nathi.
table.colSpellsTooltip: Spell e gerhajari na salang divaso no block chhe. Da.ta., Som–Budh gerhajar = 3 divas no 1 spell.
table.colBradfordTooltipBody1: Bradford Factor = spell² × gerhajar divaso. E vaaramvaar ni tunki gerhajari ne lambi karta vadhu dand aape chhe, e siddhant par ke anadhari gerhajari kamkaaj ne vadhu khalel pahochade chhe.
table.colBradfordTooltipBody2: Mool UK HR paddhati, Bradford ne ManekHR ma matra salahkari sanket tarike vaparvama aave chhe. E pagaar, raja balance ke hajri sthiti badaltu nathi.
table.colBradfordTooltipBody3: Udyog band: Ochhu < 50, Madhyam 50–124, Unchu 125–399, Khub unchu 400+.

compliance.title: Hajri anupalan
compliance.subtitle: Mahina mate defaulter, moda aavnara ane gerhajari na leaderboard.
compliance.loadError: Compliance report load kari shakayo nahi.
compliance.thresholdHint: Aa hajri dar thi niche hoy teva sabhyo defaulter tarike flag thay chhe.
compliance.thresholdInfoBody1: Je sabhyo ni aa mahina ni hajri rate aa threshold thi niche hoy teo niche aapel defaulters table ma darshavel chhe. Teo ne "Threshold thi niche" tile ma pan ganvama aave chhe.
compliance.thresholdInfoBody2: Aa threshold dareke workspace mate sachvay chhe ane badha manager o vachche share thay chhe. Je manager tene badle chhe te dareke mate kimat update kare chhe.
compliance.thresholdInfoBody3: Koi suchna ke escalation aapmele shuru thatu nathi. Sabhyo sathe jate follow-up karva aa yadi no upayog karo.
compliance.thresholdReadOnlyHint: Fakt vanchva mate. Fakt workspace malik athva admin aa threshold badli shake chhe.
compliance.thresholdSaveError: Threshold sachvi shakayu nahi. Krupa kari fari prayas karo.

defaulters.emptySub: Darek sabhya {threshold}% threshold par athva tenathi upar chhe.

overtimeAnalytics.title: Overtime Analytics
overtimeAnalytics.subtitle: Aa mahine karel overtime, sabhya, shift ane divas pramane vibhajit.
overtimeAnalytics.loadError: Overtime analytics load kari shakayu nahi.
overtimeAnalytics.notExplainer: Ahin overtime fakt jova mate mapvama aave chhe. Te kyarey aapmele payroll ma umeratu nathi. Overtime manual salary adjustment dwara chukvo.
overtimeAnalytics.emptyTitle: Aa mahine koi overtime nondhayo nathi
overtimeAnalytics.emptySub: Overtime tarike kainck nondhayu nathi. Overtime tyare j mapvama aave chhe jyare hajri policy ma overtime chalu hoy. Tracking shuru karva mate koi policy ma tene chalu karo.

kpi.peakDayHint: Ek j divas no sauthi vadhu overtime

overtimeAnalytics.groupEmpty: Vibhajan karva mate koi overtime nathi.

cost.title: Andajit overtime kharch
cost.hint: Overtime kharch no andaj kadhva upar prati kalak dar dakhal karo.
cost.disclaimer: Fakt andaaj, tame nakki karela dar pramane. Overtime aapmele payroll ma umeratu nathi - aano upyog aayojan mate karo, chukavvani rakam tarike nahi.
cost.disclaimerShort: Fakt andaj - sabhya na pagar ma lagu thatu nathi.
cost.rateTooltip: Prati kalak overtime pagar dar dakhal karo. Aa fakt jo-to kharch andaj mate vaparay chhe ane payroll ma kyarey aapmele lagu thatu nathi.

table.title: Sabhya pramane overtime
table.emptySub: Aa shodh sathe koi sabhya mel khato nathi.

policiesSettings.title: Hajri policy
policiesSettings.subtitle: Modu aavvu, vahela javu, overtime ane pagar kapat kevi rite ganay te nakki karo - pachhi lagu karta pahela asar nu purvavlokan karo.
policiesSettings.loadError: Hajri policy load kari shakai nahi.
policiesSettings.emptyTitle: Haju sudhi koi hajri policy nathi
policiesSettings.emptySub: Hajri kevi rite score thay te niyantrit karva policy banavo. Default policy dareke sabhya par lagu thay chhe je shift-vishisht policy par nathi.
policiesSettings.deleteDesc: Aa pachhu lavi shakatu nathi. Aa policy par na sabhyo workspace default par pachha fare chhe.
policiesSettings.deleteDefaultTip: Default policy kadhi shakati nathi. Pahela biji policy ne default tarike set karo.
policiesSettings.setDefaultDesc: Je sabhya shift-vishisht policy par na hoy tene aa lagu thashe. Hal ni default set nathi.

step4.title: Device sathe jodo (vaikalpik)

step4.failedLoadDevices: Device load karva ma nishfal. Tame device pasand karya vagar aagad vadhi shako chho.

step5.title: Device user ne team sabhyo sathe map karo

step5.failedLoadMembers: Team sabhyo load karva ma nishfal. Krupa kari pacha jaine fari prayas karo.

overview.anomaliesFeedTooltipBody: Jyare system shankaspad punch pattern shodhe tyare visangati flag thay chhe: secondo ma duplicate punch, nondhani vagar na device thi punch, shift samay ni bahar punch, athva ashakya samay kram. Visangatio kyarey hajri sthiti aapmele badalti nathi - e matra manager ni samiksha mate na salahkari flag chhe.

regularizationsList.headerExplainerBody: Regularization e hajri record ma pachhal thi sudhara mate no bhartiya payroll shabd chhe - samanya rite jyare kamdar punch in/out karvanu bhuli jay athva biometric device punch chuki jay. Kamdaro vinanti ubhi kare chhe; gothvel manjur karnar sankal nakki kare chhe.

regularizationSettings.title: Regularization settings
regularizationSettings.subtitle: Tamara workspace mate hajri sudharna vinanti o kevi rite kaam kare chhe te gothvo.

form.maxAttachments: Darek vinanti dith vadhu ma vadhu file jodan

tooltips.approvalLevels: Sudhara vinanti amal ma aave te pahela ketla manager e manjuri aapvi joie. 1 etle fakt sidho manager manjur kare chhe. 2 athva 3 reporting chain ma upar na vadharana star umere chhe.
tooltips.maxDaysBack: Karmchari o bhutkal ma aatla divaso ni andar ni hajri mate j sudharna vinanti ubhi kari shake chhe. Udaharan tarike, 30 etle teo fakt chhella 30 divas ni hajri sudhari shake chhe.
tooltips.fallbackApprover: Jyare karmchari no reporting manager set na hoy athva manjuri chain ukeli na shakay, tyare aa vyakti manjur karnar tarike kaam kare chhe. Bhalaman: aane HR admin par set karo.
tooltips.maxAttachments: Karmchari sudhara ni vinanti sathe ketli sahayak file (photo, dastavej) jodi shake. Vinanti mate file upload bandh karva 0 set karo.

anomalies.headerExplainerBody: Anomaly ek shankaspad haajar ighana chhe je admin review ni jarur chhe - udaaharan: anjaani device parchhi punch (unknown_sn), secondomaa rapid duplicate punch (rapid_dup), sopaayeli shift window bahar check-in (off_shift_punch), clock drift suchavtaa backdated punch (time_travel), athva 3+ salagata chukaaya check-in streaks (missed_streak). Nichena detection rules workspace mate toggle kari shakay chhe.

accessDenied.title: Access pratibandhit
accessDenied.message: Tamane attendance anomalies jovaani permission nathi. Access mate tamara workspace owner nо samparka karo.

howItWorksModal.title: Biometric hajri kevi rite kaam kare chhe?
howItWorksModal.whatIsBody: Hardware device (ZKTeco, eSSL, Realtime, Biomax) gate par karmchari ni aangli ni chhap ke chahero capture kare chhe. Darek punch {protocol} marfate real-time ma ManekHR ne moklay chhe - koi manual data entry nahi, koi USB export nahi.
howItWorksModal.step1Desc: "Device umero" screen ma thi connection URL copy karo.
howItWorksModal.step2Desc: Device na ADMS / cloud settings menu ma URL dakhal karo.
howItWorksModal.step3Desc: Ahi device manjur karo - punch aavvanu sharu thai jashe.
howItWorksModal.benefit1: Real-time punch - koi manual sync jaruri nathi.
howItWorksModal.benefit3: Koipan shift, koipan sankhya na karmchari mate kaam kare chhe.
howItWorksModal.benefit4: Hajri sidhi payroll ma jaay chhe.
howItWorksModal.security1: URL ma gupt token - fakt tamaru device j connect thay chhe.
howItWorksModal.security2: Darek device live thay te pahela manjur karo.
howItWorksModal.security3: Koipan device tarat j thobhavo ke rad karo.
howItWorksModal.security4: Juna configuration rad karva token badlo.

pendingInviteThisWs.body: {date} na roj samapt thashe. Farathi mokalva ke radda karva invitations page kholo.

registered.title: Aa number manekhr par pehlathi registered chhe
registered.body: Employee ne ek OTP mokli ne kharati karo ke aa number kharekhar emno j chhe. Bhul thi khoti vyakti ne umervva ma atkave chhe. Pachi access aapti vakhate verify karva mango cho to chhodi sako chho.
registered.verifiedTitle: Mobile verify thayo. Have aa vyakti ne umervva taiyar.
registered.skipped: Have mate chhodyu. Save karya pachi, member ni profile par Verify mobile button dekhase jethi tame pachi number verify kari sako.

mobileOtpModal.unavailable: Phone verification active karva ma aavi rahi chhe ane haji uplabdh nathi. Tame hamna member umeri shako chho ane temno number pachhi thi chakasi shako chho.
mobileOtpModal.title: Mobile number verify karo
mobileOtpModal.subtitle: Ame {mobile} par 6 ank no code moklaavyo chhe. Employee paase thi te vanchavi ahin lakho.

errors.wrongCode: Code mel khaato nathi. {remaining} prayatn baaki.
errors.rateLimited: Ghani vinanti. Ek minute raah joi farithi prayatn karo.
errors.smsFailed: SMS mokli shakaayu nathi. Number tapaaso athva farithi prayatn karo.

mobileOtpModal.success: Mobile verify thayo. Sadasya umervva nu chaalu rakho.

mobileBadge.unverifiedTooltip: Mobile haju verify nathi thayu. Ek OTP mokli ne kharati karva mate click karo ke aa number employee no j chhe.

team.grantAccessDesc: Aa karmachaarine mobile app dwara taemani mahiti access karva invite moklo.
team.grantAccessDrawerSubtitle: Role, permissions ane delivery - ek j step ma set karo.
team.grantContextWarmDesc: {name} ({identifier}) ne in-app notification milshe. SMS ni jarur nathi.
team.grantContextColdDesc: {identifier} pase manekhr account nathi. Ame sign-up link mokli daiyaa.
team.grantConflictDesc: {identifier} pehlethi ja {name} na account sathe aa workspace ma link chhe.
team.grantConflictAction1: Aa karmachari nu mobile / email update karo, pachhi retry karo.
team.grantConflictAction2: Athva pehla {name} na record par thi link kado.
team.grantAlreadyGrantedDesc: Aa sadasya ne pehlethi j app access chhe. App Access section thi lifecycle manage karo.
team.grantPermissionsHelper: Default role pase thi inherit thay chhe. Jarur hoy tyare j override karo.
team.grantDeliveryWarmHelper: Known users mate in-app notification automatic thay chhe. SMS / email optional backup chhe.
team.grantDeliveryColdHelper: Invite link kevi rite mokalva ee select karo. Email vagar pan SMS chalshe.
team.grantWarmSuccessToast: {name} ne access aapyu. Temni notifications ma thodi var ma dekhashe.
team.grantAlreadyInvitedRefreshing: Aa member ne pehle thi invite mokli didho chhe. Refresh kari rahyu chhe…

invitedShare.title: Aamantran link
invitedShare.description: {name} ne invite mokli didho chhe. Jarur pade tyare aa link share kari shako.

team.grantColdLinkCopiedToast: Invite link clipboard ma copy thayi gayel. Gameetiy share karo.
team.grantInlineFormSubtitle: Niche na step follow karo. Grant karta role, permissions ane invite, badhu ek j click ma save thay.
team.grantStep2NeedRole: Pehla role pasand karo jethi default permissions joya pachhi tweak kari shake.
team.grantStep2DefaultsHint: {role} role na defaults vapri rahya chhe. Aa karmachari mate exceptions hoy to j customize karo.
team.accessOverridesEmbeddedUsingDefaults: {role} role na defaults vapri rahya chhe. Niche koi pan cell change karo override karva.
team.accessOverridesImmediateHint: Saheli alag save thay ane minute ma apply thay. User ne potani next action par navi permissions dekhashe.
team.quickGrantPermissionsHint: Per-employee permission overrides joeo? Employee na detail page → App Access tab khol.
team.accessNoneWarmDesc: {name} nu mobile existing manekhr account sathe match thay chhe. Grant karta j in-app notification jashe. SMS spend nahi thay.
team.accessNoneColdDesc: {identifier} ne sign-up link moklo. manekhr account banaye pachhi te tamara workspace ma join thaye.
team.accessNoneConflictDesc: {identifier} {name} na account sathe register chhe. Aa karmachari no contact update karo.
team.accessNoneConflictCtaHint: Upar Edit Profile button thi mobile / email update karo, pachhi retry karo.

grantAccessSuccess.title: Aamantran share karva taiyar chhe
grantAccessSuccess.description: Aa link {name} sathe share karo jethi teo sign up karine tamara workspace ma jodai shake.
grantAccessSuccess.autoDescription: Invite {identifier} par mokli didho. Tame aa link {name} ne WhatsApp ke biji rite pan share kari shako.
grantAccessSuccess.linkOnlyDescription: {name} ne invite karva mate aa link vaapro. Copy karo ke WhatsApp par share karo.
grantAccessSuccess.warmDescription: {name} pase pehle thi manekhr account chhe - temne app ma notification mokli didhu. Notification chuki jaay to aa link pan share kari shako.
grantAccessSuccess.copyFailed: Copy thai shakyu nahi. Link pasand karine jaate copy karo.
grantAccessSuccess.shareMessage: Namaste {name}, workspace ma jodava aa link no upyog karo: {url}
grantAccessSuccess.emailSubject: Workspace ma jodava mate nu tamaru aamantran
grantAccessSuccess.expiryNote: Link 7 divas ma samapt thay chhe. Aa link dharavnar koipan vyakti mel khata phone athva email vade sign up kari shake chhe.

grantAccessEmpty.title: Haji koi bhumika nathi
grantAccessEmpty.description: Aa sathi ne je parvangio aapvi chhe teni sathe ochha ma ochhi ek bhumika banavo.

team.resignDesc: Aa sadasya ne inactive tarke nondhaashe ane taemna raajinamu ni tarikh record thaashe.
team.offboardDesc: Chalu karyo ni tarikh specify karo. Aa divas pachhi sadasya automatic dwara workspace access khoy jashe.
team.archiveDesc: Sadasya Archived tab maa jashe. Tamne gameto tyaare restore kari shako chho. Salary ane attendance history tevi ne tevi rahe. Bhauti rite kadhi naakhva Archived view maa thi 'Delete Permanently' vaparo.
team.archivePoint1: Sadasya active list maa nahi dekhay
team.archivePoint2: Salary ane attendance history sachavai ne rahe
team.bulkArchiveDesc: Sadasyo Archived tab maa jashe. Tamne gameto tyaare restore kari shako chho.
team.deactivateDesc: Aa sabhya ne nishkriya tarike chihnit karvama aavshe pan temno badho data sachvel rahese. Tame temne game tyare fari sakriya kari shako chho.
team.deactivateWarning: Nishkriya karo tyare shu thay chhe?
team.deactivatePoint1: Sabhya sakriya hajri/pagar gantari ma dekhashe nahi
team.deactivatePoint2: Badho aetihasik data (pagar, hajri) sachvel rahese
team.deactivatePoint3: Sabhya ni app access (jo aapel hoy) sthagit thashe
team.deactivateInfoDesc: Aa sabhya na user account par asar karto nathi. Jo temni pase login credentials hoy, to teo bija workspace jya teo sakriya chhe tya haju pan access kari shake chhe.
team.deleteDesc: Aa sabhya ane temno badho sambandhit data system ma thi kayam mate kadhi nakhse. Aa kriya pachhi lai shakati nathi.
team.deletePoint1: Badhi angat mahiti ane kaam ni vigato
team.deletePoint2: Sampurna pagar ane hajri no itihas
team.deletePoint3: Bank vigato, vyavharo, ane badha record
team.memberStaleRefreshing: Aa member pehlathi archive thayel lage chhe. List have refresh kari rahyu chhe.

lifecycleHelp.deactivate: Aa member ne pause karo. Te directory ma rahese ane tame gamme tyare farathi sakriya kari shako chho. Raja, sabbatical, athva temporary suspension mate vaapro.
lifecycleHelp.archive: Aa member ne sakriya directory mathi door karo ane emni app access radd karo. Pachi restore kari shakaay chhe. Jyare employee company chhode tyare vaapro.
lifecycleHelp.deletePermanently: Aa row ne workspace mathi hard-delete karo. Vyakti nu manekhr account asar paamtu nathi. Te biji je workspaces ma joadayel hoy emaa access raakhe chhe.

team.bulkReactivated: Pasand karela sabhyo safaltapurvak fari sakriya thaya
team.bulkArchived: Pasand karel sabhyo safaltapurvak archive thaya
team.bulkRestored: Pasand karel sabhyo safaltapurvak punahsthapit thaya

team.bulkDeletePartial: {ok} delete thaya, {failed} delete na thai shakya

team.bulkReactivateConfirm: Pasand karela sabhyo ne fari sakriya karva chhe?

team.detailFillRequiredSection: Krupa karine {section} vibhag ma jaruri fields purna karo.

attendance.record: Dainik hajri record - ek divas mate vyakti ni sthiti (Hajar, Gerhajar, Adadho divas, Raja par). Juo record jue chhe, Mark divas ni sthiti set kare chhe, Edit sachvel record badle chhe, Delete ek kadhi nakhe chhe. Self vyaap etle fakt tamara potana divaso; All etle dareke.
attendance.selfPunch: Sabhya nu potanu check-in / check-out ghadiyal. Punch karva mate aa parvangi ane workspace ni 'Self check-in' niti chalu hovi jaruri chhe (Workspace settings, Hajri). Ekli parvangi puri nathi.
attendance.analytics: Sanstha-vyapi hajri dashboard ane report - overview, muster grid, overtime, anupalan, gerhajari pattern. Fakt-vanchan ane workspace-vyapi.
attendance.export: Hajri ane vaidhanik export download karo (registers, PF / ESI files).
attendance.events: Kacho punch-event log - dareke check-in ane check-out, biometric device sahit. Delete ek khota punch ne rad kare chhe. Aa punch no audit view chhe, punch karva nu kaam nahi (te Self check-in chhe).
attendance.anomaly: Visangatta katar - flag thayel aniyamit punch ane pattern, sathe temne shodhta niyamo.
attendance.device: Biometric device ane kiosk setup - punch hardware register, sopo ane configure karo.
attendance.policy: Hajri niti o - hajri ganay tyare lagu thata moda-aagman, vehela-prasthan, overtime ane comp-off niyamo.

leave.request: Raja ni arji o - raja ni arji karo, tamari requests juo, ane temne rad karo athva pachi khencho. Self etle tamari potani; All etle koi na vati arji karo ke juo.
leave.approval: Tamari approval chain ma raja ni requests manjur karo ke nakaro. Vyakti kyarey potani request manjur kari shakti nathi.
leave.balance: Dareke raja na prakar pramane raja baki - opening, uparjit, vaprayel ane uplabdh.
leave.compOff: Comp-off - kaam karel raja no divas ke saptahik raja no davo karo (arji) ane dava manjur karo (nirnay). Self-davo mate workspace self-service niti pan jaruri chhe.
leave.type: Raja-prakar suchi configure karo - pagari ane binpagari prakaro, uparjan, ane varsh-ante carry-forward.
leave.settings: Workspace raja settings - approval chain, sandwich-raja niyam, retro window, ane manual balance gothvan.
leave.delegation: Coverage window mate tamari approval satta bija approver ne delegate karo.

regularization.request: Hajri-sudharna requests - bhutkal na divas mate sudharna uthavo, tamari requests juo, ane temne rad karo. Self-uthav mate workspace self-service niti pan jaruri chhe.
regularization.approval: Tamari chain ma hajri-sudharna requests manjur karo ke nakaro. Vyakti kyarey potani manjur kari shakti nathi.
regularization.settings: Regularization workflow config - approval staro, retro window, ane jodan maryada.

holidays.calendar: Karyasthal nu raja calendar - badha mate vahenchayela bin-karyakari divas. Jova thi sabhya calendar joi shake chhe; Umero, Sampadan ane Kadhi nakho e vyavasthapak kriyao chhe. Rajao karyasthal-vyapi sandarbh mahiti chhe, etle koi swa ke badha scope nathi - badha saman yadi jue chhe.

finance.invoice: Vechan kar bhartiya. Juo bhartiya jue chhe, Banavo ane Sampadan karo draft par kaam kare chhe, Post karo draft ne kramankit, khatavahi-asarkarak bhartiya ma antim banave chhe, Kadhi nakho draft rad kare chhe, ane Moklo tene email, WhatsApp ke SMS dwara pahochade chhe. Swa scope etle fakt sabhye banavela bhartiya; badha etle darek bhartiyu. Moklo ane Kadhi nakho samvedansheel chhe: moklava thi sanchar credit vaparay chhe ane rad karva thi bhartiyu dur thay chhe.
finance.creditNote: Post karela bhartiya saame credit note. Ek banavva thi output kar ane bhartiya ni baki rakam ultavay chhe (kalam 34), etle te samvedansheel ane khatavahi-asarkarak chhe. Swa etle sabhya na potana bhartiya saame; badha etle koipan bhartiyu.
finance.expense: Dhandha na kharch (bhadu, vijli, jalavni, parchuran). Juo kharch jue chhe, Banavo navo nondhe chhe. Swa etle fakt sabhya ni potani entryo; badha etle darek ni.
finance.payment: Bhartiya saame malel chukvani nondho. Swa etle sabhya na potana bhartiya saame; badha etle koipan bhartiyu.
finance.report: Finance dashboard ane party / nafo-nuksan report. Fakt-vanchan ane karyasthal-vyapi, etle koi swa ke badha scope nathi.
finance.gst: GST gothvan - dar, return, ane e-invoice / e-way settings. Ek samvedansheel anupalan sapati.
finance.settings: Finance ane pedhi settings - branding, bhartiya kramankan shreni, ane pedhi-dith anupalan profile. Ek samvedansheel vyavasthapak sapati.

plansEditor.trialDurationHelp: Aa plan par nava sign-up ne malta full-access free trial na divaso. 0 = koi trial nahi.
plansEditor.isDefaultHelp: Chalu hoy tyare, nava users ne aapomele aa plan sonpay che. Aa product mate no aagal no default aapomele radd thay che.
plansEditor.isTrialPlanHelp: Nava sign-ups trial period mate aa plan ni access par shuru thay che, pachi default plan par aavi jay che. Aa plan na modules ane limits nakki kare che ke trial ma shu khule che; te kharidi shakay teva plan tarike nahi dekhay.
plansEditor.defaultTagTooltip: Nava sign-up ne aapomele aa plan sonpay che.
plansEditor.upfrontDiscountHelp: Varshik kimat ek j upfront chukvanima bharva par % chhut. 0 = koi chhut nahi.
plansEditor.installmentsEnabledHelp: Grahako ne varshik kimat 0%-vyaj na masik hapta ma bharva do.
plansEditor.installmentMonthsHelp: Varshik kimat ne ketla masik hapta ma vehchavi (saamanya rite 12).
plansEditor.gstEnabledHelp: Chalu hoy tyare, aa plan ma GST umeray chhe ane checkout vakhte batavay chhe. GST-mukt athva karmukt bhav mate bandh karo.
plansEditor.gstRateHelp: Aa plan par lagu thati GST takavari (saamanya rite 18). GST bandh hoy tyare avganay chhe.
plansEditor.gstInclusiveHelp: Chalu hoy tyare, plan na bhav ma GST pehle thi samel chhe (checkout vakhte alag karay chhe). Bandh hoy tyare, GST upar umeray chhe.
plansEditor.cardContentHint: Pricing card par batavay chhe. Koi pan field khali rakho to default text vaprashe.

moduleAvailability.description: Locked module par customer ne shu dekhay te pasand karo: 'Coming Soon' notice (module haji banyu nathi) athva plan-upgrade prompt (uncha plan ma male che). Aa fakt message badle che - kai unlock nathi kartu.

delete.confirmBody: {date} na roj {operatorName} mate no {logCode} soft-delete thashe. Tame edit window ma tene punahsthapit kari shako chho.

basePay.extraCTCMode: CTC breakdown mathi aapmele ganay chhe. Jarur hoy to CTC adjust karo athva uparno koi ghatak override karo.

hourlyPay.infoTitle: Kalak pramane pagar samay aadharit input mathi ganay chhe.

hourlyPay.overrideMonthlyExtra: Ganeli kimat vaparva mate khali rakho

switchModal.toHourlyTitle: Kalak pramane pagar par switch karvu chhe?
switchModal.toMonthlyTitle: Masik pagar par switch karvu chhe?
switchModal.toHourlyContent: Aanathi karmchari masik pagar parthi samay aadharit kalak pagar par jashe. Koipan CTC, pagar structure ane ghatak override setup bhunsai jashe.
switchModal.toMonthlyContent: Aanathi karmchari samay aadharit kalak pagar parthi masik pagar par jashe. Koipan kalak dar, dainik-kalak ane override setup bhunsai jashe.

overview.kpiOutstandingAdvancesInfo: Advance ek nani, vyas-mukt rakam chhe jo sabhya ne pagaar pahela apai chhe. Aage na pagaar mathi dhime dhime kapi levay chhe. Aa total haji ketli rakam vasool baki chhe te batave chhe. [Native review jaruri]
overview.kpiActiveLoansSub: {count, plural, one {# loan} other {# loans}} - {principal} baki principal
overview.kpiActiveLoansInfo: Loan ek moti rakam chhe je EMI plan saathe aavi shake chhe. Advance karta aa ghani mahinao sudhi chali shake chhe. Aa total badhi sakkrut ane paused loan no baki principal batave chhe. [Native review jaruri]
overview.kpiBonusCommissionInfo: Aa pagaar uparant ni extra chukvani chhe. Teni vapas levati nathi. Payment sathe umerela commission pan aa total ma samel chhe, double-count thaatu nathi. [Native review jaruri]

payments.pageSubtitle: Paisa ni herfer tapaso, advance trace karo, ane samaygala pramane payroll chukavni melavo.

settings.pageTitle: Payroll na niyamo ane defaults set karo
settings.pageDescription: Payroll setup pasand karo, tamne jaruri workflows chalu karo, ane workspace defaults nakki karo je module ma pagar kevi rite chale chhe te ghade chhe.
settings.accessWarning: Payroll settings badalva mate tamne admin athva malik access jaruri chhe.

presets.heading: Payroll setup pasand karo
presets.description: Preset thi sharu karo, pachhi toggles fine-tune karo jethi salary module tamaro business kharekhar payroll kevi rite chalave chhe teni sathe mel khay.
presets.customWarning: Feature controls have koi preset sathe mel khata nathi. Customize chalu rakho athva tene reset karva fari preset lagu karo.
presets.confirmContent: Aa badha feature toggles ne {label} defaults par reset karshe.

features.heading: Tamne jaruri payroll features chalu karo
features.description: Aa workspace toggles nakki kare chhe ke payroll, chukavni ane export ma kaya salary workflows dekhay chhe.

defaults.heading: Tamara workspace payroll defaults set karo
defaults.description: Aa defaults pagar formatting, fixed-day pagar seeds, hajri payroll vartan ane module ma payroll timing nakki kare chhe.
defaults.workingDaysHint: Jyare pagar setup fixed month days no upayog kare tyare default fixed-day aadhar tarike vaparay chhe.
defaults.attendanceDefaultHint: Workspace default hajri vartan vaparta karmchario aa niyam anusarshe.
defaults.attendanceDisabledAlert: Hajri aadharit pagar hal ma band chhe
defaults.attendanceDisabledAlertDescription: Upar aa suvidha chalu na thay tya sudhi aa workspace pagar gantari ma hajri ne avgaṇshe. Sachvel karmchari hajri pasandgio tya sudhi nishkriya raheshe.
defaults.seedAlert: Workspace default nava salary setup mate sharuaati mulya aape chhe
defaults.seedAlertDescription: Aa default badalva thi je karmchario e potano salary day-basis ke hajri vartan pahele thi sachvyu chhe teo badlata nathi.
defaults.saveHint: Default sathe j sachvay chhe jethi karmchario ane nava salary setup eksarkha rahe.
defaults.unsavedBannerDescription: Workspace mate formatting, hajri default ane fixed-day payroll seed sachvo.

statutory.heading: Vaidhanik Kapaat Setup
statutory.description: Tamara workspace mate PF, ESI, PT, TDS ane LWF vaidhanik kapaat niyamo gothvo.

pf.enableHint: Paatra karmchario mate karmchari PF kapaat generation chalu karo.
pf.wageCeilingHint: Vaidhanik maryada Rs.15,000 chhe. min(basic, ceiling) par yogdan ganay chhe.

esi.enableHint: Paatra karmchario mate karmchari ESI kapaat generation chalu karo.
esi.grossThresholdHint: Je karmchario no gross aa rakam barabar ke tena thi ocho hoy teo ESI lagu pade chhe. Vaidhanik maryada Rs.21,000 chhe.

pt.enableHint: Pasand karela gross salary slab aadhare Professional Tax kapaat lagu karo.
pt.stateHint: Jya tamara karmchario kaam kare chhe te rajya pasand karo. Aa rajya na PT slab aapmele lagu thashe.
pt.customSlabsLabel: Platform default ne badle custom PT slab vaaro
pt.customSlabsHint: Fakt aa workspace mate share karel admin slab table ne override karo.
pt.customSlabsDescription: Aa workspace mate gross-salary slab ane PT rakam nakki karo.
pt.ratesNote: Pasand karela state mate kul pagar na slab aadhare PT dar mahine kapavama aave chhe.

tds.enableHint: TDS dar mahine andajit varshik aavak, tax regime ane rokan ghoshna aadhare ganay chhe.
tds.projectionBody: Run Payroll page parthi darek karmchari mate ghoshna dakhal karo. Engine andajit varshik aavak, pasand kareli tax regime ane sachvela ghoshna value no upyog kari ne masik TDS kapaat aapmele post kare chhe.
tds.scopeNote: Fakt full-time ane part-time karmchario mate lagu. Contract/consultant TDS (194C) ahi handle thatu nathi.

lwf.enableHint: Darek karmchari na rojgar state aadhare LWF aapmele June ane December ma (athva West Bengal mate fakt December ma) kapavama aave chhe.
lwf.ratesNote: Darek karmchari na rojgar state aadhare LWF aapmele June ane December ma (athva West Bengal mate fakt December ma) kapavama aave chhe.
lwf.fallbackStateNote: Je karmchario nu state set karelu nathi teo temna LWF state tarike workspace PT state (halma: {state}) vaparshe.
lwf.ratesFootnote: Dar state kayda dwara nakki thay chhe. Karmchari nu state team member profile ma set thay chhe (Work tab thi Statutory and Tax).

disbursement.heading: Chokvani ane Hajari Niyamo
disbursement.description: Pagar kyare chukvay shake, niyamitikaran window, pagar-nuksan posting, ane raja/saptahik-off hajari gantrini rite asar kare chhe te gothvo.

templates.heading: Fari vaapri shakay teva CTC breakdown vyakhyayit karo
templates.description: CTC aadharit karmchario mate fari vaapri shakay teva pagar structure banavo. Default template aapmele pasand thay chhe jyare tame eva karmchari mate pagar set karo jeni paase pahelethi sachvelu template na hoy.
templates.deleteConfirmDescription: Teno upyog karta karmchario par asar nahi thashe pan temne fari teni assign nahi kari shakay.
templates.emptyDescription: Haji koi salary structure template nathi. Upar na Quick Setup no upyog karo athva custom template banavo.

compliance.heading: Advance Recovery Anupalan
compliance.description: Salary advance recovery mate nyuntam vetan ane katati maryada niyamo set karo.
compliance.minWageHint: Agar set na karyu hoy to khali chodo. Jyare set hoy, advance recovery take-home aa raqam karta ochhu nahi kare.
compliance.wageCategoryHint: Tamara swasandarbh mate. Aa workspace mate laghu nyuntam vetan anusuchi sathe male.
compliance.deductionCap75Tooltip: 75% maryada faqat tyare laghu pade che jyare workspace pase Vetan Bhugatan Adhiniyam s.7(3) hethad sahakari mandal katati hoy. Aa vikalp pasand karta pahela tamara shramo kayda salahakarne malo.
compliance.advisoryOneThirdLabel: Hapto 1/3 vetan karta vadhare hoy tyare salah chetavani batavo
compliance.advisoryOneThirdHint: Faqt salah - plan ne avrodh nahi. Vetan Bhugatan Adhiniyam s.12A margdarshan par adharit.
compliance.legalNote: Aa maryadao Vetan Bhugatan Adhiniyam 1936 ane 2019 na Wage Sanhita par adharit che. Katati maryada badlav pahela tamara shramo kayda salahakarne malo.

selection.allLockedTooltip: Badha pasand karel record lock chhe. Chukavva mate temne unlock karo.

empty.noTeamBody: Payroll manage karva pahela tamari team umero.
empty.noMatchTitle: Tamara filter sathe koi karmchari mel khato nathi

shiftEmpty.title: Vartman filter sathe koi shift group mel khatu nathi
shiftEmpty.body: Payroll ne fari shift pramane jova mate shodh ke sthiti filter saf karo.

shiftRows.loading: Shift karmchario load thai rahya chhe...
shiftRows.noMatchInShift: Aa shift ma koi mel khata karmchari nathi.

shiftRows.noMatchTitle: Aa filter mate aa shift saf chhe
shiftRows.noMatchBody: Aa shift ma payroll panktio jova mate biji sthiti ke shodh ajmavo.

adjustmentDrawer.title: Pagar adjustments - {name}

paymentSettlement.heading: Payment settlement
paymentSettlement.notPayingInFull: Puri chukavni nathi karta? Kapaat (write-off, withholding, vagere) thi balance band karo.
paymentSettlement.overpaidDeductionInfo: Aa pagar puro chukvai gaya pachhi kapaat lagu karvama aavi. Vadhare chukvel rakam karmchari pasethi vasool karvani chhe.
paymentSettlement.overpaidAdvanceInfo: Chukavni halna chokkha payable pagar karta vadhare chhe. Vadharani rakam advance tarike nondhvama aavi.
paymentSettlement.balanceInfo: Sakriya pagar adjustments lagu karya pachhi haju payable aa rakam chhe.

adjustmentDrawer.paymentLedgerNote: Pagar adjustments payroll gantari badle chhe. Payment na record alag rahe chhe ane Payment Ledger ma j rahe chhe.
adjustmentDrawer.notGeneratedNote: Aa karmchari mate pasand karela mahina no payroll haju generate thayel nathi. Tame pehlu adjustment sachavsho tyare ame te aapmele generate karishu.

composer.heading: Adjustment umero
composer.description: Mahina-aadharit pagar umero ke kapaat no record post karo. Post karel rakam reverse ane fari-entry thi sudharay chhe.
composer.lockedMessage: Aa pagar record lock karel chhe. Tame itihas joi shako chho, pan adjustment umervva ke reverse karva pehla tene unlock karo.
composer.correctionDraftDescription: Aa navi entry reverse karel adjustment "{title}" sathe jodashe. Nichena field tapaso, pachhi sudharel posting ne nava record tarike sachvo.

history.heading: Adjustment itihas
history.description: Aa pagar mahina mate sakriya ane reverse karel entryo.
history.emptyBody: Aa mahina matena umera ane kapaat ahin dekhashe.
history.badgePaymentLinkedTooltip: Chukavni nondhai tyare aapmele banel (da.ta. commission, vadharani chukavni). Purvavat karva mate link karel chukavni reverse karo.
history.badgeSystemTooltip: System dwara aapmele banel (da.ta. advance vasulat). Purvavat karva mate srot advance chukavni reverse karo.
history.menuReverseDisabledTooltip: Chukavni athva system kriya dwara aapmele banel. Aane purvavat karva mate link karel chukavni reverse karo.
history.correctionLinked: Reverse karel adjustment "{title}" sathe link karel sudhara entry.

commission.pageSubtitle: Team mate commission ane incentive chukvani track karo
commission.loadError: Commission data load na thayo. Fari prayas karo.
commission.singleLedgerDesc: Ahiya badi commission ane incentive rakkam ek j khatamanthi chhe. Payment modal ane bulk import bannethi umareyal commission sahit - double gantri kyarey nahi.
commission.infoTooltip: Commission e pagarna upar umaratun performance-aadharit payment chhe. Te pachhi pachi letum nathi. TDS lage chhe. PF ane ESI baakat chhe. Ahina totalsmaan payment modal dvaara umareyal commission pan saamel chhe - double gantri nathi. Incentive e j chhe pan bain-sales performance mate.
commission.emptyEntries: Pasand karel filter mate koi commission nodh mali nathi.
commission.pfEsiTooltip: Commission ane incentive PF ane ESI vetanmanthi baakat chhe. TDS saamaanya rite lage chhe.
commission.drawerSubtitle: Ek athva vadhu team saabhya mate aapel samayagala mate commission athva incentive nodho.
commission.recordError: Commission nodh na shakyo. Fari prayas karo.
commission.recordValidationEmpty: Submit karta pahela ochhamaan ochhi ek manvy nodh umero.
commission.csvFormatDesc: Ek line = ek nodh. Column (header aichhhik):
commission.csvNoValidRows: Koi manvy pankti nathi. Bhulo sudharo.
commission.scheduleError: Schedule update na thayo. Fari prayas karo.
commission.deleteConfirmDesc: Aa schedule purn ganashe. Bhavishyamaan auto-disburse nahi chale. Haal chukaavel nodho aprabhaavit.
commission.disburseDrawerDesc: Chakkas samayagala mate commission chukvani trigger karo. Aa paagar gothvan umere chhe. Same period fari submit karo - safe chhe.
commission.disburseAlreadyDone: Aa samayagala mate commission pahelethi chukvayo chhe.
commission.ytdEmpty: Aa naanakiy varsha mate koi commission/incentive nodh mali nathi.

bonus.pageSubtitle: Statutory bonus ane festival bonus tamari team mate
bonus.loadError: Bonus data load nahi thayo. Fari prayas karo.
bonus.infoTooltip: Statutory Bonus kayadakiy farajiyat chhe (Payment of Bonus Act). Rs 21,000/mas sudhi na karmacharione lagu. Ochhamam ochi 8.33%, vadhuma vadhu 20%. 30 November sudhi chukvavanu. Festival Bonus tamari pasand chhe. Banne TDS-karpatr, PF-bakat. Ek j khatu - no double count.
bonus.singleLedgerTitle: Ek j khatu - no double count
bonus.singleLedgerDesc: Statutory bonus, festival bonus ane adjustment form thi umherayela bonus badha ek khata ma nondhaay chhe.
bonus.statTotalHint: Badha prakar na bonus, ek khatu
bonus.statRunsHint: A naanakiy varsh bonus run ni sankhya
bonus.eligibilityDesc: Rs 21,000/mas sudhi. Ganana adhar Rs 7,000 athva lughuttam vetan. 30 kam divas jaruri. 8.33% ochha, 20% vadhu. 30 November sudhi. PF-bakat. TDS lage.
bonus.percentTooltip: 8.33% (minimum) ane 20% (maximum) vacche percentage nakkhi karo. CA sathe confirm karo.

attendanceStatutory.headerExplainerBody: Vaidhanik export e Bharatiya shram-kayda ni filing mate jaruri purva-format register chhe - Muster Roll (Shops & Establishments Act hethal Form T), ESI yogdan challan, PF / EPFO return, ane eva j. Column + rounding + sahi block inspector-facing format sathe mel khay chhe jethi tame sidhu print kari file kari shako. Rajya-vishisht template niche yadi chhe.

pillars.title: Network, marketplace ane hiring, saathe.
pillars.sub: Trade roj kare chhe te tran kaam mate ek j login.

network.title: Juo ane dekhao
network.body: Tamaru kaam post karo ane tamara trade ne follow karo, jethi sacha loko jue ke tame shu banavo chho.

marketplace.title: Tamaru kaam vecho
marketplace.body: Free dukaan kholo, tamari products muko, ane kharidnaar ne sidha tamara sudhi pahonchva do.

hiring.title: Hire karo ane naukri melvo
hiring.body: Jobs post karo ke kaam shodho, ane ek tap ma voice note thi arji karo.

how.title: Sign-up thi pehli puchhparchh sudhi tran pagla ma.
how.sub: Koi setup fee nahi. Koi training nahi. Ek phone bas chhe.

create.title: Tamari free profile banavo
create.body: Tamara phone number thi sign up karo. Tamari aavdat, dukaan ke company page umeradi do, tamari bhasha ma.

post.title: Je banavo chho ke joiye chhe te post karo
post.body: Tamari dukaan ma products muko, feed ma tamaru kaam batavo, job post karo ke bhaav mango.

deal.title: Sidhi vaat karo ane sodo karo
deal.body: Puchhparchh thi private chat sharu thaay chhe. Bhaav ane delivery tame banne nakki karo, ahin ke WhatsApp par.

modules.title: Connect ni andar na paanch sadhno.
modules.sub: Network, marketplace ane hiring paanch jodayela sadhno par chaale chhe, je ek profile, ek inbox ane ek search vehenche chhe.

feed.title: Feed
feed.desc: Tamara kaam na photo ane video post karo, jethi aakho trade jue ke tame shu banavo chho.

storefront.title: Dukaan
storefront.desc: Free online dukaan, jema tamari products, bhaav ane share kari shakaay tevu web address.

rfq.title: Quotations
rfq.desc: Tamare je joiye te post karo ane vechnaar na bhaav baju bajuma sarkhavo.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.desc: Kaam post karo ke shodho. Arji ek tap ke voice note thi thaay chhe.

chat.title: Chat
chat.desc: Photo ane voice note saathe na private messages, je soda saathe jodayela rahe chhe.

audience.title: Trade chalavnara loko mate banaavel.
audience.sub: Loom thi dukaan na counter sudhi, ane trade ne taleem aapti sanstha o sudhi.

karigar.title: Vankar ane karigaro
karigar.body: Tamari aavdat ane junu kaam batavo, shodhava laayak bano, ane je best karo chho tena mate kaam melvo.

trader.title: Vepario
trader.body: Kapad, doro ane samagri shodho, jaruriyat post karo, ane sacha vechnaar na bhaav sarkhavo.

mill.title: Mill ane factory maliko
mill.body: Tamara unit ne company page aapo, products muko, ane karigaro tatha job-workers shodho.

jobseeker.title: Job shodhnara
jobseeker.body: Tamari aavdat saathe match thati jobs juo ane voice note ke resume thi arji karo.

institute.title: Sanstha o ane academy
institute.body: Free page kholo, tamara course muko, vidyarthi o ne sacha workshop ma gothvo, ane aakha trade ma olakh banavo.

student.title: Vidyarthi o
student.body: Kaushalya shikho, tamari sanstha pushti kare evi Trained-at olakh batavo, ane sacha workshop ma naukri melvo.

serviceProvider.title: Service aapnara ane nishnaat
serviceProvider.body: Consultants, machine jaalvani, dyeing ane printing, transport ane biju ghanu. Tame su karo chho e batavo, tamara rate nakki karo, ane kaam melvo.

trust.title: Sacha, verified dhandha saathe vaat karo.
trust.sub: Nakli lead no dhaglo nahi. Ahin no bharoso sachi pravrutti thi aave chhe, vachno thi nahi.

verified.title: ManekHR par verified
verified.body: Dhandha potane verify kari shake chhe, jethi tame jaano ke soda ni biji baju kon chhe.

erpBacked.title: Sacha dhandha no aadhar
erpBacked.body: Company page ManekHR ERP saathe jodi shakaay, je system par te dhandho roj chaale chhe.

ratings.title: Sacha soda pachhi j rating
ratings.body: Star rating e kharidnaar pase thi aave chhe jemne kharekhar vechnaar saathe sodo karyo hoy, anaami review thi nahi.

direct.title: Sidhu, vacche koi dalaal nahi
direct.body: Tame bija dhandha saathe jaate sodo karo. ManekHR koi commission letu nathi ane tamara soda ni vacche aavtu nathi.

broker.title: Dalaal saacho track record banave chhe
broker.body: Dalaal kharidnar ane vechnar ni olakhaan karave chhe. Banne paksh olakhaan ni pushti kare chhe, etle verified record bane chhe. Review khaangi rahe chhe ane fakt aadyaksharo batave chhe, kyarey review aapnar nu naam nahi.

pricingStory.title: Vaaparva free. Fakt vadhu pahonch mate chukvo.
pricingStory.body: Profile, dukaan, product listing, jobs, quotations ane chat free chhe. Paisa tyare j aave jyare tame ichchho: post, product ke job ne vadhu loko sudhi pahonchadva boost karo. ManekHR tamara soda ma thi kyarey hisso letu nathi.

points.free: Profile, dukaan, job, bhaav ane chat: free
points.boost: Boost optional ane prepaid chhe, budget tame nakki karo
points.commission: Tamara soda par koi commission nahi, kyarey nahi

erp.title: Factory ke dukaan chalavo chho? Tena mate ERP pan chhe.
erp.sub: ManekHR ERP tamari team, hajri, pagaar, billing ane machines sambhale chhe. Ek j login, alag product, e j trade mate banaavel.
erp.trialNote: Badha feature saathe free trial. Card ni jarur nathi.

faq.headline: Kharidnaar ane vechnaar je puchhe chhe te prashno.

free.a: Ha. Jodavu, products mukvi, job post karvi, bhaav maangva ane chat karvi badhu free chhe. Aaje fakt boost karva na paisa laage chhe, ane te optional chhe.

sell.q: Hu shu muki ke vechi shaku?
sell.a: Trade je banave ke jeni jarur pade te badhu: saree, kapad, doro, bharatkam ane jari kaam, job work, machinery ane taiyaar maal. Listing ma photo, tunko video, bhaav, minimum order ane delivery samay hoy chhe.

commission.a: Na. ManekHR banne paksho ne jode chhe ane teo sidho sodo kare chhe. Te paisa ke order sambhaltu nathi, ane tamara soda ma thi kyarey hisso letu nathi.

enquiries.q: Kharidnaar mara sudhi kevi rite pahonche?
enquiries.a: Kharidnaar tamari product ke dukaan kholi ne Contact seller dabave chhe. Tenathi tamari saathe private chat sharu thaay chhe. Tame tamari dukaan ni link WhatsApp par pan share kari shako chho, ane tamara public pages search ma dekhaay chhe.

quotes.q: Quotations kevi rite kaam kare chhe?
quotes.a: Kharidnaar jaththo, samagri, budget ane kya sudhi ma joiye te saathe jaruriyat post kare chhe. Vechnaar bhaav ane delivery samay saathe javaab aape chhe. Kharidnaar bhaav baju bajuma sarkhavi ne ek sweekare chhe, jenathi private chat khule chhe.

languages.q: Kai bhashao ma kaam kare chhe?
languages.a: English, Gujarati, ane English akshro ma lakheli Hindi ke Gujarati. Bhasha ek vaar pasand karo ane gamme tyare badlo.

gst.a: Na. Phone number thi sign up thaay chhe. Karigaro, job shodhnara ane nani dukaano GST vagar jodai shake chhe.

work.q: Su hu tena par kaam shodhi shaku?
work.a: Ha. Job board tamari aavdat saathe match thati jagyao aagal batave chhe. Tame lakhi ne, resume jodi ne ke voice note record kari ne arji kari shako chho.

institutes.q: Su sanstha o course muki shake?
institutes.a: Ha. Taleem aapti sanstha ke academy free page kholi ne potana course muki shake chhe, ane shikhnara checkout vagar puchhpchhar kari ne nondhani karave chhe. Sanstha o pote bhnavela vidyarthi o mate Trained-at olakh ni pushti pan kari shake chhe.

services.q: Su hu fakt product nahi, service o pan aapi shaku?
services.a: Ha. Salahkaro, machine repair ane jaalvani, rangaai ane printing, transport ane logistics, contractor ane job-work karnara pote aapti service o bhaav saathe muke chhe. Kharidnar app ma service na prakaar ane jagya pramane shodhe chhe ane bhaade rakhva khaangi chat shuru kare chhe.

broker.q: Dalaal suvidha kevi rite kaam kare chhe?
broker.a: Dalaal kharidnar ane vechnar ni olakhaan karave chhe, ane banne paksh olakhaan ni pushti kare chhe, etle koi ekla shrey na lai shake. Samay jata dalaal verified track record banave chhe. Review khaangi hoy chhe ane fakt aadyaksharo batave chhe, kyarey review aapnar nu naam nahi, ane dalaal te badli ke chhupavi shakto nathi.

finalCta.headline: Aakha trade ma dekhava laago.
finalCta.sub: Profile ane dukaan banavva ma thodi minute laage chhe. Free, tamari bhasha ma, tamari paase rahela phone par.

erp.headline: Tamaru aakhu unit ek app thi chalavo.
erp.sub: Hajri, pagaar, billing ane machine ek j jagya e. Badha feature saathe free trial thi sharu karo. Card ni jarur nathi.

footer.trust: Tamaro data tamaro j rahe chhe - ame kyarey vechta nathi. Vaparva mate free, tamara sauda par koi commission nahi.
