how.title: Tran pagla ma chaalu.
how.sub: Mota bhaag na members minutes ma taiyaar thai jaay chhe.

profile.title: Profile ke page banavo
profile.body: Phone thi free sign up karo. Tamari profile, company page ke dukaan minutes ma taiyaar karo.

post.title: Muko ke mango
post.body: Products umero, tamaru kaam post karo, job kholo, ke bhaav mate jaruriyat post karo.

deal.title: Chat karo ane sodo karo
deal.body: Darek puchhparchh ek inbox ma aave chhe. Tame sidho vyavhaar karo ane jya faave tya sodo puro karo, WhatsApp sahit.

modules.title: Connect ni andar shu chhe.
modules.sub: Paanch jodayela saadhano, je ek profile, ek inbox ane ek search vapre chhe.

feed.title: Trade ne batavo ke tame shu banavo chho.
feed.body: Tamara kaam na photo, video, documents ane voice note post karo. Tamari feed ma tame follow karo chho te loko ane tamara trade tatha jilla nu navu saru kaam banne male chhe, etle saru kaam tamara contacts thi aagal pahonche chhe. Ochhu batavo options thi tame tamari feed jaate ghado chho.
feed.b1: Photo, video, documents ane voice note
feed.b2: Tamara trade ane jilla na loko sudhi pahoncho
feed.b3: React, comment, repost ane save karo

storefront.title: Tamari dukaan, aakha trade mate khulli.
storefront.body: Photo, tunko video, bhaav, minimum order ane delivery samay saathe products muko. Temne tamara brand ni dukaan niche gothvo, jenu potanu web address hoy chhe. Kharidnaar marketplace ma fare chhe, tamari product khole chhe, ane Contact seller dabavi ne tamari saathe private chat sharu kare chhe.
storefront.b1: Photo ane tunka video saathe free listing
storefront.b2: Tamari potani dukaan ni link, WhatsApp par share karvi saheli
storefront.b4: Puchhparchh private chat tarike aave chhe
storefront.note: ManekHR kyarey paisa ke order letu nathi. Tame saamevala saathe sidho vyavhaar karo chho.

rfq.title: Je joiye te post karo. Aavela bhaav sarkhavo.
rfq.body: Kharidnaar jaruriyat post kare chhe: jaththo, samagri, jillo, budget ane kya sudhi ma. Vechnaar bhaav, delivery samay, sample ane shu shaamel chhe te saathe vyavasthit quote aape chhe. Kharidnaar bhaav baju bajuma sarkhave chhe, shortlist kare chhe ane ek sweekare chhe. Sweekarvathi sodo puro karva private chat khule chhe.
rfq.b1: Ek jaruriyat ghana vechnaar sudhi pahonche chhe
rfq.b2: Quotes vyavasthit hoy chhe ane sarkhavva sahela chhe
rfq.b3: Sweekarel quote thi private chat khule chhe

jobs.title: Karigaro hire karo. Kaam shodho.
jobs.body: Workshop potane joitu kaam post kare chhe. Karigaro eva board par fare chhe je temni aavdat saathe match thati jobs aagal batave chhe, ane lakhi ne, resume jodi ne ke voice note record kari ne arji kare chhe. Malik ek j screen parthi shortlist kari ne sweekare chhe. Job potana naame ke company page tarike post kari shakaay chhe.
jobs.b1: Aavdat match thavathi yogya jobs aagal aave chhe
jobs.b2: Voice note thi arji karo, lakhvani jarur nathi
jobs.b3: Ek j jagya e shortlist karo ane sweekaro

chat.title: Darek vaatchit, tena sandarbh saathe.
chat.body: Photo ane voice note saathe na private messages, tarat pahonche chhe. Chat product ni puchhparchh, job ni arji ke sweekarel quote saathe jodayeli rahi shake chhe, etle vaatchit shena vishe chhe te hammesha khabar rahe chhe. Block, report ane shaant anti-spam ajanya messages kaabu ma raakhe chhe.
chat.b1: Tarat pahonche, photo ane voice note saathe
chat.b2: Product, job ke quote saathe jodayeli
chat.b3: Block ane report controls andar j chhe

shop.title: Tamari products ne dukaan ni baari malvi joiye.

hire.title: Aa season ma hire karo chho?

boost.title: Boost vishe ek saachi vaat.
boost.body: Upar nu badhu free chhe. Vadhu pahonch joiye tyare tame post, product ke job boost kari shako chho, ane te aakha Connect ma sponsored label saathe dekhaay chhe. Chukvani prepaid wallet ma thi thaay chhe, jya ek rupiya nu ek credit male chhe. Budget tame nakki karo chho, boost tenathi vadhare kyarey kharch kartu nathi, ane budget puru thaay ke samay puro thaay tyare atki jaay chhe. Vadhu limits vaali paid plans pachhi aavshe; free tier raheshe j.

trust.title: Evu banaavel ke tame koni saathe vyavhaar karo chho te khabar rahe.
trust.sub: Vishwas na sanket sachi pravruti ma thi aave chhe, vachano ma thi nahi.

erpLinked.title: Sacha dhandha no teko
erpLinked.body: Company page ManekHR ERP workspace saathe jodi shakaay chhe, je system par te dhandho roj chale chhe. Jodayela pages par dekhaatu vishwas chinh hoy chhe.

ratings.title: Juna kharidnaar na rating
ratings.body: Vechnaar paase pehla vyavhaar karela kharidnaar na star rating hoy chhe, je temni products ane dukaan par dekhaay chhe.

direct.title: Sidho vyavhaar, vachetiya vagar
direct.body: Tame saamena dhandha saathe sidhi vaat karo chho ane bhaav tatha delivery tame banne nakki karo chho. ManekHR tamara soda ni vachche aavtu nathi.

safety.title: Control tamara haath ma
safety.body: Koi ne pan ek tap ma block ane report karo. Shaant anti-spam chat ma ajanya messages kaabu ma raakhe chhe.

broker.title: Verified record vala dalaal
broker.body: Dalaal kharidnar ane vechnar ni olakhaan karave chhe, banne paksh teni pushti kare chhe, ane verified track record bane chhe. Review khaangi rahe chhe ane fakt aadyaksharo batave chhe, kyarey review aapnar nu naam nahi.

builtFor.title: Trade kharekhar je rite chale chhe tena mate banaavel.
builtFor.sub: India na textile trade mate banaavel, karigar thi factory owner sudhi.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp ne anukul
whatsapp.body: Darek public page ek tap ma WhatsApp par share thaay chhe, etle sodo tya puro thaay jya trade pehlethi vaat kare chhe.

languages.title: Tamari bhasha bole chhe
languages.body: English, Gujarati, ane English akshro ma Hindi ke Gujarati. Darek potani bhasha pasand kare chhe.

mobile.title: Pehla phone
mobile.body: Badhu tamara khissa na phone par chale chhe, ane joiye tyare laptop par pan.

visual.title: Shabdo karta kaam
visual.body: Ahin photo, video ane voice note trade chalave chhe. Lakhvu optional chhe, job ni arji mate pan.

free.title: Dekhavu free chhe
free.body: Profile, listing, jobs ane quotations free chhe. Aaje fakt boost j paid chhe.

services.title: Service aapo, kaam melvo
services.body: Consultants, jaalvani ane repair, dyeing ane printing, transport, contractors ane job-workers potani profile par aapti service ane rate batave chhe, ane madi aavi ne kaam melve chhe.

institutes.title: Trade shikhvo. Tena mate naukri melvo.
institutes.sub: Taleem sanstha o potana course batave chhe ane vidyarthi o ne gothve chhe; vidyarthi o potani sanstha e pushti kareli olakh saathe raakhe chhe.

courses.title: Tamara course muko
courses.body: Free page kholo ane tame shikhvo chho te darek course muko. Shikhnara jue chhe ane checkout vagar puchhpchhar kari ne nondhani karave chhe, etle tame sidhi vaat karo.

placement.title: Tamara vidyarthi o ne gothvo
placement.body: Tamara vidyarthi o have kya kaam kare chhe te batavo, ane taleembaddh haath shodhta workshop pase thi bharti ni tako melvo.

credential.title: Trained-at olakh saathe raakho
credential.body: Vidyarthi shu shikhyo te batave chhe, jeni teni sanstha pushti kare chhe, jethi bharti vakhte maalik tena par bharoso kari shake.

services.title: Service aapo. Tena mate madi aavo.
services.sub: Consultant thi lai ne machine repair, dyeing, transport ane job-work sudhi, trade pote shu kare chhe te muke chhe ane kharidnar prakaar ane jagya pramane shodhe chhe.

list.title: Tame aapo chho te service muko
list.body: Salah ane jaalvani thi lai ne dyeing, printing, transport ane job-work sudhi, tame aapo chho te service o bhaav saathe sidhi tamari profile par umero.

found.title: Madi aavo ane kaam melvo
found.body: Jemne service joiye chhe te kharidnar ane vechnar tamne bhaade rakhva khaangi chat shuru kare chhe. Tame sidho vyavhaar karo, vachetiya vagar.

browse.title: Prakaar ane jagya pramane shodho
browse.body: App ma service o ne prakaar ane jagya pramane filter karo ane tamari najik ni yogya madad shodho, jethi shodh kharekhar kaam karnara loko sudhi pahonche.

track.title: Track record banavo
track.body: Juna kharidnar na star rating tamari service par rahe chhe, jethi saaru kaam aagal vadhe ane navo kharidnar kone bhaade raakhe chhe tena par bharoso kari shake.

faq.title: Connect vishe loko je puchhe chhe.

free.a: Ha. Profile, dukaan, listing, feed, jobs, quotations ane chat free chhe. Vadhu pahonch mate boost karvu e j aaje paisa vaali vastu chhe.

boost.a: Tame nakki karo. Boost prepaid wallet ma thi thaay chhe, jya ek rupiya nu ek credit male chhe. Budget tame nakki karo chho, te tenathi vadhare kharch kartu nathi, ane budget ke samay puro thaay tyare atki jaay chhe.

commission.q: Su ManekHR commission le chhe ke paisa sambhale chhe?
commission.a: Na. Kharidnaar ane vechnaar ahin ek bija ne shodhe chhe ane sidho vyavhaar kare chhe. ManekHR order ke paisa process kartu nathi, ane koi hisso letu nathi.

storefront.q: Mari dukaan ma shu shaamel chhe?
storefront.a: Photo ane tunka video, bhaav, minimum order ane delivery samay saathe ni tamari products, tamara brand niche gothveli, potana web address saathe. Link WhatsApp par share karo ke gamme tya chhaapo.

rfq.q: Quotations kevi rite kaam kare chhe?
rfq.a: Jaththo, samagri, budget ane kya sudhi ma joiye te saathe tamari jaruriyat post karo. Vechnaar vyavasthit quotes mokle chhe. Baju bajuma sarkhavo ane gamme te sweekaro. Tenathi private chat khule chhe.

voice.q: Koi lakhya vagar mari job mate arji kari shake?
voice.a: Ha. Karigar voice note record kari ne ke resume jodi ne arji kari shake chhe. Tame tamari arajdaar yaadi ma te sambhdo ke vaancho chho ane tyathi shortlist karo chho.

languages.q: Connect kai bhashao support kare chhe?
languages.a: English, Gujarati, ane English akshro ma lakheli Hindi ke Gujarati. Darek potani bhasha pasand kare chhe ane gamme tyare badli shake chhe.

safety.a: Ek tap ma block karo ane account report karo. Shaant anti-spam chat ma ajanya messages maryadit raakhe chhe, ane rate card jevi samvedansheel vigato fakt sign in karela jonaar ne j dekhaay chhe.

trainedAt.a: Te profile par ni ek verified line chhe je batave chhe ke vyakti e kya taleem lidhi. Vidyarthi course umere chhe, sanstha teni pushti kare chhe, ane naukri aapti vakhte maalik tena par bharoso kari shake chhe. Jene kaushalya shikhyu hoy tene ena mate shodhva ma te madad kare chhe.

services.q: Su hu fakt product nahi, service o muki shaku?
services.a: Ha. Consultants, machine repair ane jaalvani, dyeing ane printing, transport ane logistics, contractor ane job-work karnara pote aapti service o bhaav saathe muke chhe. Kharidnar app ma service na prakaar ane jagya pramane shodhe chhe ane bhaade rakhva khaangi chat shuru kare chhe.

broker.q: Dalaal ni olakhaan kevi rite kaam kare chhe?
broker.a: Dalaal kharidnar ane vechnar ni olakhaan karave chhe, ane banne paksh olakhaan ni pushti kare chhe, etle koi ekla shrey na lai shake. Samay jata dalaal verified track record banave chhe. Review khaangi hoy chhe ane fakt aadyaksharo batave chhe, kyarey review aapnar nu naam nahi, ane dalaal te badli ke chhupavi shakto nathi.

meta.title: Pricing: ManekHR ERP plans ane free Connect network
meta.description: Tamara aakha textile business mate saral, transparent pricing. ManekHR ERP free ma athva full-access trial sathe shuru karo, card vagar. ManekHR Connect vaaparva free chhe.

hero.title: Tamara aakha business mate saral pricing.
hero.sub: Tamari factory ManekHR ERP par chalavo. Free ma shuru karo athva full-access trial lo, card vagar. Ane ManekHR Connect network hammesha vaaparva free chhe.

erpHeading.title: Tamari team sathe vadhta plans
erpHeading.sub: Hajri, pagar, machine ane production ek j system ma. Free ma shuru karo ane jem vadho tem tools umero. Setup fee nahi, gme tyare cancel karo.

trial.title: {days} divas free, full access
trial.sub: Darek ERP feature {days} divas mate free ajmaavo. Card nahi, koi commitment nahi. Chukvata pehla tamari team gothvo ane chalti juo.

assurances.a2: Gme tyare cancel karo, koi lock-in nahi

connectHeading.title: Network vaaparva free chhe
connectHeading.sub: Aakha textile vepaar ma shodhao, bharti karo ane soda karo. Hammesha free. Vadhu pahonch joiye tyare j optional boost mate chukvo.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Dekhava ane vyavhaar karva je joiye te badhu.
free.f2: Photo ane tunka video saathe product listing
free.f3: Job board: job post karo ane arji karo
free.f4: Quotations: jaruriyat post karo ane bhaav moklo
free.f5: Photo ane voice note saathe private chat
free.f6: English, Gujarati ane English akshro ma Hindi ke Gujarati

boosts.name: Boost
boosts.desc: Post, product ke job mate optional vadharani pahonch.
boosts.f1: Ek rupiya nu ek credit, koi pack nahi
boosts.f2: Budget ane samay tame nakki karo
boosts.f4: Budget ke samay puro thaay tyare atke chhe

pricing.note: Free tier hammesha free rahe chhe. Fakt vadhu pahonch joiye tyare j boost karo. Ek rupiye ek credit, ane koi subscription jaroori nathi.

trial.q: Free trial kevi rite kaam kare chhe?
trial.a: Nava ERP workspace full-access free trial sathe shuru thay chhe. Darek feature unlock, credit card vagar. Te puri thay tyare tame fakt ek plan pasand karo ane tamaro data tamari pase j rahe chhe. Trial ni lambai upar ane plan card par batavel chhe.

whichPlan.q: Mari team mate kayo plan yogya chhe?
whichPlan.a: Gothvai rahela 5 sudhi na loko mate Free yogya chhe. Starter raja ane full hajri umere chhe, Growth full pagar ane statutory compliance umere chhe, ane Business machine, production, multi-location ane advanced reports umere chhe. Bhalaman mate upar na team-size helper no upyog karo.

billing.a: Paid plan ek-varsh ni mudat chhe. Varsh agaau thi chukvo (batavel koi pan upfront discount sathe) athva 12 vyaj-mukt masik hapta ma. Plan dar varshe aapmele renew thay chhe ane darek renewal pehla ame email kariye chhiye.

gst.q: Shu kimmat ma GST samel chhe?
gst.a: Darek plan card batave chhe ke GST samel chhe ke upar umeray chhe, ane kaya dare. Tamara invoice GST-taiyaar chhe, jethi tame input credit dawo kari shako.

switch.q: Shu hu pachhi upgrade ke downgrade kari shaku?
switch.a: Ha. Tamari team vadhe ke jarooriyat badlay tem gme tyare plan badlo. Tamaro data ane itihaas sathe rahe chhe.

connectFree.q: Shu ManekHR Connect kharekhar free chhe?
connectFree.a: Ha. Connect network (tamari profile, storefront, jobs ane quotation) tamara soda par commission vagar vaaparva free chhe. Fakt optional kharch e vadhu pahonch mate post boost karvano chhe, je vapraash pramane chukvay chhe.

cancel.q: Jo hu cancel karu to shu thay?
cancel.a: Tame koi lock-in vagar gme tyare cancel kari shako chho. Tamari paid mudat na ant sudhi tamne access rahe chhe, ane amari retention policy mujab tamaro data uplabdh rahe chhe.

roles.b3: Tamaro dhando jeam goothvayel chhe te rite custom roles

meta.title: ManekHR vishe: te shu chhe ane kona mate chhe

hero.title: ManekHR shu chhe?
hero.sub: ManekHR shu chhe, kona mate chhe ane tena par tame shu kari sako teno sidho javab.

answer.heading: Tunk ma.
answer.body: ManekHR India na textile vepar mate ek free B2B network, marketplace ane jobs platform chhe, jeni niche ERP tools (hajri, pagar, GST billing, utpadan) chhe. Te kapda na vepari, karigar, dalal, mill ane talim institute mate banaavel chhe, ane Gujarati, Hindi ane English ma chale chhe.

free.heading: Free ma shuru.
free.body: Jodavu, profile banavvi, product ane seva list karvi, nokri post karvi, bhaav maagva ane chat karvi, badhu free chhe. Vaikalpik boosting ane paid ERP plan jarur pade tyare vadhu aape chhe, ane ManekHR tamara soda par koi commission leta nathi.

what.a: ManekHR India na textile vepar mate ek free B2B network, marketplace ane jobs platform chhe, jeni niche ERP tools (hajri, pagar, GST billing, utpadan) chhe. Te aakha vepar ne ek professional ghar ma laave chhe.

who.a: ManekHR kapda na vepari, karigar, dalal, mill ane utpadak, talim institute ane temna vidyarthi, ane udyogbhar na seva aapnaar mate banaavel chhe.

free.a: Haa. Jodavu, profile banavvi, product ane seva list karvi, nokri post karvi, bhaav maagva ane chat karvi, badhu free chhe. Vaikalpik boosting ane paid ERP plan no kharch thaay chhe, ane ManekHR tamara soda par koi commission leta nathi.

do.q: ManekHR par hu shu kari saku?
do.a: Tame vepar sathe network kari sako, free dukaan kholine product ke seva vechi sako, nokri post ane arji kari sako, ane hajri, pagar ane GST billing jeva ERP tools thi tamari factory ke dukaan chalavi sako.

languages.q: ManekHR kai bhashao support kare chhe?
languages.a: ManekHR Gujarati, Hindi ane English ma chale chhe, jema English aksharo ma lakhel Gujarati ane Hindi pan saamel chhe. Tame gamme tyare bhasha badli sako.

hero.sub: Account delete karva vishe man badlyu, athva data-suraksha vishe koi prashna chhe? Amaro sampark aa rite karo.

recover.heading: Delete karelu account pachhu melavo
recover.body: Jo tamaru account delete karva mate nirdharit hoy, to tene pachhu melavva tamari pase 30 divas chhe. Te tarikh pehla tamara registered sarnamethi amne email karo ane amari team tene punahsthapit karshe. 30 divas pachhi delete kayami thai jay chhe ane pachhu lavi shakatu nathi.

officer.heading: Data-suraksha fariyad adhikari
officer.sla: Ame darek vinanti no 3 karyakari divaso ma swikar kariye chhiye.
officer.noEmail: App ma na support athva amara contact page dwara amaro sampark karo ane ame tamari vinanti fariyad adhikari sudhi pahochadishu.

lockedOut.heading: Account ma pravesh band thai gayo chhe?
lockedOut.body: Amaro sampark karva tamare sign in karvani jarur nathi. Tamara registered email athva phone number thi amne email karo ane tamari vinanti par karya karta pehla ame tamari olakh chakasishu.

meta.title: Surat ane India mate textile networking | ManekHR
meta.description: India na textile vepar sathe network karo. Surat ane aakha India ma vepari, karigar, dalal, mill, institute ane seva aapnaar sathe jodao. Jodavu free, Gujarati, Hindi ane English ma.

hero.title: Surat ane India nu textile networking platform.
hero.sub: Textile veparbhar ma vepari, karigar, dalal, mill, institute ane seva aapnaar ne shodho ane jodao. Profile banavo, saachaa chakasayela vepar sudhi pahancho ane sidho soda karo. Jodavu free.

answer.heading: Textile network shu chhe?
answer.body: Textile network e jagya chhe jya vepar na badha, vepari ane karigar thi laine dalal, mill, institute ane seva aapnaar, ekbija ne shodhi sake ane vepar kari sake. Surat ane aakha India ma aa networking WhatsApp group, market ane bolchal par chaltu hatu. ManekHR tene online laave chhe: tame professional profile banavo, seva na prakar ane sthan pramane shodhao, ane commission vagar chakasayela vepar sudhi sidha pahancho.
answer.lead: Kevi rite chale chhe te juo
answer.homeLink: ke home page thi shuru karo.

how.q: Surat ma textile vepar sathe hu kevi rite network karu?
how.a: ManekHR ma jodao, vepar ma tamari bhumika mate free profile banavo, ane tame seva na prakar ane sthan pramane shodhava lago. Tame Surat ane aakha India ma vepari, karigar, dalal, mill, institute ane seva aapnaar ne shodhi sako, ane pachhi vaat shuru karva temne sidho sandesh moklo.

free.a: Haa. Jodavu, profile banavvi, shodhavu ane chat karvi, badhu free chhe. Vaikalpik boosting jarur pade tyare vadhu pahanch aape chhe, ane ManekHR tamara soda par koi commission leta nathi.

who.a: Textile vepar ma koi pan: vepari ane jatthaband vechnaar, karigar ane kaamdaar, dalal ane broker, mill ane utpadak, talim institute ane vidyarthi, ane seva aapnaar. Network Gujarati, Hindi ane English ma chale chhe.

industry.caption: India no textile udyog ek najar ma

workforce.label: loko India na textile ane kapda na vepar ma kaam kare chhe, je kheti pachhi bija kram e chhe.

stock.title: Stock saaransh
stock.lowStockOnlyAria: Fakt ochha stock ni items batavo
stock.emptyTitle: Haji koi stock track thayo nathi
stock.emptyBody: Item master ma items umero ane opening stock athva purchase bill nondho jethi tamari inventory ahin dekhay.
stock.reorderTip: Reorder level e hath par no jaththo chhe jya item fari kharidvi joie. Aa level thi nichi items flag thay chhe jethi tame samaysar kharidi kari shako.
stock.valuationTip: Stock value hath par ni dareek item na sarerash kharch (weighted-average paddhati) parthi ganay chhe. Inventory ma bandhayeli working capital mapava teno upyog karo.

godowns.title: Godown
godowns.tip: Godown (warehouse) e bhautik sthal chhe jya stock rakhvama ave chhe. Maal, shakha athva warehouse pramane track karva stock ne Godown vachche vehencho.
godowns.emptyBody: Tamari pedhi mate Main Godown bani rahyu chhe. Tema thodi var lage chhe.
godowns.defaultHint: Tame default Godown vapri rahya chho. Sthal, maal athva warehouse pramane stock vehenchva vadhu Godown umero.

batches.title: Batch
batches.tip: Batch eksathe utpaadit eko ne jutha karе chhe (ghani vaar manufacturing ane expiry date sathe) jethi stock batch pramane track ane recall kari shakay.
batches.emptyTitle: Batch tracking F-10 ma avi rahyu chhe
batches.emptyBody: Manufacturing voucher saksham thaya pachhi batch registry uplabdh thashe.

serials.title: Serial
serials.tip: Serial number ek bhautik ek ne olkhe chhe jethi tene kharidi thi vechan, return athva scrap sudhi vyaktigat rite track kari shakay.
serials.emptyBody: Serial tracking saksham items mate tame purchase post karo tyare serial number nondhay chhe.
serials.scrapConfirmTitle: Serial '{serial}' ne scrap tarike chihnit karvu?
serials.scrapConfirmDesc: Ek stock mathi dur thashe ane pachhu melavi shakashe nahi.

transfers.title: Stock Transfer
transfers.emptyBody: Tamara Godown vachche maal khasedva stock transfer vapro.

wastage.title: Bagad Register
wastage.tip: Bagad nuksan pamela, expire thayela athva khovayela maal ne nondhe chhe. Dareek entry double-entry tamara khata ma post thay chhe jethi nuksan tamara hisab ma dekhay.
wastage.emptyBody: Prakriya daramyan nuksan pamela, expire thayela athva khovayela maal ne nondho. Badho bagad double-entry tamara khata ma post thay chhe.

lots.title: Lot
lots.tip: Lot e stock no track karelo batch chhe (vaikalpik inward ane expiry date sathe) je traceability ane first-expiry-first-out picking mate vaparay chhe.
lots.emptyBody: Lot tracking saksham items mate tame purchase bill post karo tyare Lot aapoaap bane chhe. Tame Lot jate pan banavi shako chho.

samples.title: Sample ane Consignment
samples.tip: Sample ane consignment e grahak ne manjuri mate moklel maal chhe. Swikrut maal tax invoice ma feravay chhe; baki no stock ma return ave chhe.
samples.emptyBody: Manjuri mate athva consignment par grahako ne moklel maal ne track karo. Swikrut maal aapoaap tax invoice ma feravay chhe.

bom.tip: Bill of Materials (BOM) ek finished item ni ek batch banavva mate jaruri components ane quantity darshave chhe. Te manufacturing voucher par material vaparash ane costing ne chalave chhe.

vouchers.tip: Manufacturing voucher ek production run nondhe chhe: te (BOM mujab) input material vaapre chhe ane finished item banave chhe, ane cost na tafavat ne variance tarike post kare chhe.

listCommon.tip: Job-work etle GST hethal processing mate principal ne maal moklavo (ke emni pase thi melavvo). Maal ni maliki principal pase j rahe chhe; ITC-04 aa herfer nondhe chhe.

itc04.title: ITC-04 quarterly report
itc04.tip: ITC-04 e quarterly GST return chhe je job-worker ne mokleli ane temni pasethi maleli mal ni jaan kare chhe. Export karelu JSON vaapri ne GST portal par file karo.
itc04.exportTooltip: Pasand karel quarter mate GSTN-spec ITC-04 JSON file download kare chhe. Portal filing mate tamara CA sathe share karo.
itc04.footerNote: hash ane signature field khali chhe - upload par GSTN portal dwara ganay chhe
itc04.noData: {quarter} FY {fy} mate koi data uplabdh nathi
itc04.exportSuccess: {quarter} FY {fy} mate ITC-04 JSON download thayu
itc04.exportFailed: ITC-04 JSON banavva ma nishfal. Khatri karo ke badha challan ma manya paksh GSTIN chhe.

pending.title: Baki mal register
pending.tip: Baki mal e mukhya paksh no mal chhe je haju tamari custody ma chhe. Tene track karo jethi dareko lot GST samay-maryada ma pacho apay (athva deemed supply ganay).
pending.emptyBody: Mukhya paksh no badho mal pacho apai gayo chhe. Navi job-work custody track karva inward challan post karo.

master.title: Items
master.hsnSacTip: HSN (maal mate) athva SAC (services mate) e GST vargikaran code chhe je lagu tax rate nakki kare chhe. Tamari rate notification mathi 4-8 ank no code dakhal karo.
master.trackBatchTip: Aa item ne batch ke lot pramane (inward/expiry date sathe) track karva chalu karo. Je items tame pachhi mangavo ke pehla-expiry-pehla-out pasand karo tena mate vaapro.

hub.title: GST Paalan
hub.info: GST returns taiyar, verify ane file karva mate ek j jagya: GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, ITC-04, e-Invoice, e-Way Bill ane filing pahela na data checks.

gstr1.title: GSTR-1
gstr1.info: GSTR-1 e tamara outward supplies (vechan) nu monthly athva quarterly return chhe. Data verify karo, pachhi portal par upload karva GSTN JSON export karo.

gstr3b.title: GSTR-3B
gstr3b.info: GSTR-3B e monthly summary return chhe jya tame net tax liability declare karo chho ane input tax credit no claim karo chho. Export pahela cells manually override kari shakay chhe.

bankAccounts.info: Bank accounts tamari firm na balance rakhe chhe ane bank reconciliation ne feed kare chhe. Navi receipt ane payment mate ek ne default tarike mark karo.

bankAccounts.deleteConfirmBodyDetail: Aa action pachhi fervi shakati nathi. Zero na hoy tevi balance vada accounts delete thai shakta nathi.

reconcile.title: Bank reconciliation
reconcile.info: Bank reconciliation tamara import karela bank statement ne ledger entries sathe match kare chhe jethi darek line no hisab thay.

reconcile.loadSessionFailed: Reconciliation session load karva ma nishfal.

cashRegisters.title: Cash registers
cashRegisters.info: Cash registers haath ma ni rokad track kare chhe. Ganatari ane reconcile mate day-end tally vaapro, ane petty cash ne teni imprest rakam sudhi bharo.
cashRegisters.noFirm: Krupa kari pehla Finance > Dashboard dwara firm set karo.
cashRegisters.empty: Koi cash register madyu nathi. Finance firm setup dwara ek banavo.

cheques.info: Cheque register jari karela ane madela cheques track kare chhe, jema post-dated cheques (PDC) ane temni maturity dates no samavesh thay chhe.

contras.info: Contra entry tamara potana cash ane bank accounts vachche paisa khasede chhe (udaharan tarike, bank ma rokad jama). Te koi party ne asar karti nathi.
contras.noFirm: Krupa kari pehla Finance > Dashboard dwara firm banavo.

ruleForm.daysOffsetExtra: Negative = due pehla (e.g. -3 etle due date na 3 divas pehla). Positive = due pachhi (e.g. +7 etle 7 divas overdue).

ruleForm.partyExtra: Chokkas party pasand karo athva badhi parties par lagu karva 'Global' raakho.

settings.title: Reminder settings
settings.subtitle: Aa firm mate global reminder vartan goothvo. Per-rule override default karta agrata le chhe.
settings.loadFailed: Reminder settings load karva ma nishfal
settings.saveFailed: Reminder settings save karva ma nishfal
settings.dispatchNote: Nondh: Vaastvik dispatch cron darroj 07:30 IST par chale chhe. Aa setting nondhay chhe pan halma dispatch schedule badaltu nathi.
settings.minimumOutstandingExtra: Fakt e parties ne reminder karo jemni baki aa threshold upar hoy.
settings.maxRemindersExtra: Salamati maryada - aksmate spam run atkave chhe.
settings.smsWarningBody: TRAI sathe DLT registration jaruri chhe (Principal Entity + sender header + template manjuri). Registration purna thaya pachhi j chalu karo. Unregistered sends Bhartiya telecom operators dwara block thashe.
settings.pushWarningBody: Mobile app dwara user devices par FCM token registration jaruri chhe. Registered token vagar na users mate push notification shantithi nishfal thashe. Users ne temnu device register karva mobile app ma login karva kaho.
settings.whatsAppWarningBody: AiSensy account, Meta-manjur WhatsApp message template ane sakriya Live campaign jaruri chhe. Template manjuri purna na thay tya sudhi sends nishfal thashe. Manjuri prakriya shuru karva AiSensy support no sampark karo.
settings.creditsTitle: SMS / WhatsApp mokalva mate credits jaruri

overLimit.hideBodyGrace: Tamari pase {limit} mathi {used} {kind} chhe. {date} pachhi, tame limit ma pacha na aavo tya sudhi sauthi navi {excess} jaherma chhupavi devashe. Kai pan kadhvama aavtu nathi.
overLimit.hideBodyActive: Tame limit thi vadhare hova thi tamari {count} {kind} jaherma chhupaveli chhe. Te tamara khata ma rahe chhe ane kai pan kadhvama aavtu nathi. Pachhi lavva mate ketlik kadho athva upgrade karo.
overLimit.suppressedTooltip: Aa vastu tamari plan limit thi vadhare chhe, etle jaherma chhupaveli chhe. Te tamara khata ma rahe chhe ane kai pan kadhvama aavtu nathi. Tene pachhi lavva biji vastuo kadho athva upgrade karo.

errors.generic: Ame tamari poochhparachh mokli shakya nahi. Krupa kari fari prayas karo.

inquiry.enrolIntro: Sanstha ne tamari vigato ane prashno moklo. Teo seats, batch ni tarikho ane fee confirm karva jawab aapshe. ManekHR payment athva enrolment sambhalatu nathi.

new.title: Product umero
new.subtitle: Dhanda na kharidnara shodhi shake e mate utpadan athva seva umero. Tame list karo ke turant j te live thai jashe.
new.requiredNote: Publish karva jaruri: Shirshak ane Shreni
new.duplicateCta: Athva hal na product ni nakal karo

new.draftSavedAgo: Draft {minutes, plural, one {# minute} other {# minute}} pahela save thayo
new.flashPublished: Product publish thayu. Have pachhi nu umero.

section.photosHelp: Spasht, saara prakaash vaala photos umero. Pehlo photo cover tarike dekhaay chhe. Tran ke vadhu photos vaali listings ne vadhu inquiries male chhe. JPG ke PNG, darek 5MB sudhi.
section.videoHelp: Tamari product chalti batavva ek tunko video umero ({seconds} second sudhi). Optional. MP4 ke WebM.
section.detailsHelp: Kharidaaro ne kalpana karva ma madad karo. Saamagri, gunvatta ane koipan sharto janavo.
section.pricingHelp: Badhu optional. Kharidaar ne decide karva ma madadrup hoy te umero.
section.locationHelp: Najik na kharidaaro ne tamne shodhva ma madad kare chhe.
section.specsHelp: Optional. Kharidnar ne table rupe dekhay - kapad, kaam, rang, vajan, je decide karva ma madad kare te.
section.tradeTermsHelp: Tame kevi rite dispatch karo, chukvani lo ane return sambhalo. Product page par dekhashe.

tips.needDescription: Saamagri ane nyuntam order umero. Kharidaaro pehla aaj puchhe chhe.

new.publishMissing: Publish karva shirshak ane shreni umero.
new.successBody: Tamaru product have list thai gayu chhe ane marketplace par kharidaro ne dekhay chhe.
new.collectionsHelp: Aa product ne tamari shop na collections ma group karo (optional).

course.sectionHelp: Vidyarthio ne janavo ke temne shu malshe: ketlo samay chale chhe, aagli batch kyare shuru thay chhe, kevi rite bhanavay chhe, ane fee.
course.durationHelp: Course ketlo samay chale chhe, tamara potana shabdo ma.
course.batchStartHelp: Vaikalpik. Jo tame koipan samaye vidyarthio ne pravesh aapo chho to khali rakho.
course.seatsHelp: Darek batch ma tame ketla vidyarthio lo chho teni vaikalpik maryada.
course.modeRequired: Course kevi rite bhanavay chhe te pasand karo.
course.feeTypeHelp: Free, set fee, athva fee range pasand karo.
course.certificateHelp: Jo vidyarthio purna kare tyare certificate melve chhe to chalu karo.
course.skillsHelp: Vidyarthi je skills shikhe chhe te add karo. Type karo ane Enter dabavo.

service.sectionHelp: Kharidnar ne janavo ke tame kevi rite kaam karo chho: tame service kya aapo chho, kevi rite charge karo chho, kayo vistar aavri lo chho ane tamari upalabdhata.
service.deliveryModeLabel: Tame te kevi rite aapo chho?
service.deliveryModeHelp: Tame kharidnar ni jagyaae, durthi, ke banne rite kaam karo chho.
service.deliveryModeRequired: Tame service kevi rite aapo chho te pasand karo.
service.pricingModelLabel: Tame kevi rite charge karo chho?
service.pricingModelHelp: Tame kaam ni kimat kevi rite rakho chho te pasand karo. Dar phone par nakki karva mate Negotiable pasand karo.
service.pricingModelRequired: Tame kevi rite charge karo chho te pasand karo.
service.coverageAreaHelp: Vaikalpik. Tame je jagyaaoe service aapo chho, tamara pota na shabdo ma.
service.yearsExperienceHelp: Vaikalpik. Tame aa kaam ketla samay thi karo chho.
service.availabilityHelp: Vaikalpik. Kharidnar tamaro sampark kyare kari shake ke kaam book kari shake.
service.availabilityPlaceholder: dakhla tarike Som thi Shani, savare 9 thi sanje 7

mine.title: Mari listing
mine.emptyBody: Tame hju sudhi kai mukyu nathi. Kharidnara shodhi shake e mate utpadan athva seva muko.
mine.errorBody: Ame tamari listing load kari shakya nahi.
mine.previewDisabledTip: Preview mate aa product pura karo

mine.noMatch: Tamara filter thi koi product mel khato nathi.

edit.title: Listing ferfar karo

edit.successBody: Tamara ferfar sachvai gaya ane turant j kharidaro mate live chhe.

inquiries.title: Poochhparachh
inquiries.emptyReceivedBody: Jyare koi kharidnar tamari listing vishe sampark karshe, tyare ahin dekhashe.
inquiries.emptySentBody: Jyare tame koi vikreta no sampark karsho, tyare ahin dekhashe.
inquiries.errorTitle: Tamari poochhparachh load kari shakai nahi

services.title: Services Shodho
services.help: Vepar ma service aapnara ne service na prakar ane sthal pramane shodho. Service no prakar pasand karo, jilla ane kimat pramane sankdu karo, pachhi sidho sodo karva puchhparchh moklo.
services.subtitleBrowse: Aakha vepar ni badhi service. Upar service no prakar pasand karo, athva sankdu karva search karo.
services.subtitleRecent: Aakha vepar ma service aapnara. Sankdu karva search karo athva service no prakar pasand karo.
services.subtitleResults: {count, plural, one {# service aapnar} other {# service aapnara}}
services.subtitleResultsQuery: "{query}" mate {count, plural, one {# service aapnar} other {# service aapnara}}
services.browseBody: Upar service no prakar pasand karo, athva filter ma jilla ane kimat pramane sankdu karo.
services.emptyBody: Haji koi service yaadi ma nathi. Jyare service aapnara temni service yaadi karshe, tyare ahin dekhashe. Sthal ke kimat vadhari jovo, athva thodi var pachhi farthi jovo.
services.emptyBodyQuery: "{query}" sathe kai mel khadhu nahi. Alag service no prakar ajmavo, athva sthal ane kimat vadharo.
services.categoriesAria: Service na prakar pramane browse karo
services.entryPoint: Service joie chhe? Service aapnara shodho

search.placeholder: Services shodho, dakhla tarike machine repair, transport

policy.gateBody: Tamari profile, network ane marketplace vaparva mate ManekHR Connect shartoo vaancho.

crossSell.erpBody: Tame workshop malik tarke sign up karyu chhe. Attendance ane payroll chalava tamaru workspace gothvo, ane tamari factory no track record Connect trust badge banashe.
crossSell.nudgeBody: Tamari workshop shodhay ema madad karo. Textile trade na dhanda ma lok ane workshop shodho.

collections.intro: Tamara products ne collections ma group karo je buyers browse kari sake.
collections.productsSaved: Aa collection ma {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}}
collections.emptyBody: Collections tamara products (jem ke Sarees ke Wholesale lots) ne group kare che jethi buyers moto catalog browse kari sake.
collections.noProductsToAdd: Pehla shop ma products add karo, pachi ahi group karo.
collections.deleteBody: Collection nikli jashe. Products rahese; fakt grouping jashe.
collections.descriptionPlaceholder: Collection upar dekhati ek nani line.

meta.title: Refer karo ane kamao
meta.description: Mitro ne ManekHR Connect par nimantrit karo ane muft boost credits kamao.

hero.title: Refer karo ane kamao
hero.earnLine: Tamaro mitra joi tyare tene {referee} muft boost credits male che, ane tame {referrer} kamao cho.
hero.copyFailed: Copy na thai. Maherbani kari hathathi copy karo.
hero.shareText: ManekHR Connect par mara sathe jodao ane {referee} muft boost credits melo: {link}
hero.whatsappAriaLabel: WhatsApp par tamari referral link share karo
hero.nativeShareTitle: ManekHR Connect par mara sathe jodao

list.title: Tame refer karela logo
list.subtitle: Chhella 20
list.empty: Haju koi referral nathi. Kamaava mate tamari link share karo.

howItWorks.title: Aa kevi rite kaam kare che

step1.title: Tamari link share karo
step1.body: Mitro ne tamari referral link moklo.

step2.title: Tamaro mitra jodai ane saktiya thay
step2.body: Te tamari link thi sign up kare ane Connect vaparva sharu kare.

step3.title: Tame banne boost credits kamao
step3.body: Thodi samiksha pachhi credits tamara wallet ma ave.

terms.note: Credits e muft in-app credits chhe je tame fakt post boost karva mate vapri shako. E rokad nathi ane upadi ke transfer kari shakati nathi. Aa karyakram gme tyare badli ke band kari shakay chhe.

disabled.title: Referral tunk samay ma avse
disabled.body: Aa karyakram haju saktiya nathi. Thodi var pachhi tapaaso.

error.title: Tamara referrals load na thai shakya
error.body: Kai khotu thayun. Fari prayaas karo.

boostNudge.title: Muft boost credits kamao
boostNudge.body: Koi mitra ne refer karo ane tame banne boost credits melo.

signup.label: Referral code (vakalpik)
signup.hint: Mitra no code che? Vadhu boost credits mate umerao.

meta.title: Introductions
meta.description: Tamara mate karela introductions confirm karo, ane tame karela introductions juo.

introductions.pageSubtitle: Ek dalal be vyakti no parichay karavi shake. Live thay e pehla banne baju confirm kare.

privacy.title: Tamari gopniyata surakshit chhe
privacy.body: Parichay ni pushti karva thi fakt e chakasay chhe ke te kharekhar thayo hato. Ame kyarey tamaro phone number ke contact details share karta nathi. Jo tame pachhi thi dalal no review aapo, to tamaru naam mulbhut rite khangi rahe chhe, fakt tamara aadyakshar, role ane shaher j batavay chhe.

introductions.brokerOnlyHint: Be vyakti no parichay karavva mate tamari profile par broker vikalp chalu karo.
introductions.toConfirmEmpty: Tamari confirmation mate koi introduction raah joi rahyu nathi.
introductions.mineEmpty: Tame haju sudhi koi introduction karavyu nathi.
introductions.receivedEmpty: Haju sudhi koi confirm thayelo introduction nathi. Tamara mate karavelo introduction banne pakshe confirm thay pachhi, tame ahi dalal no review aapi shakso.
introductions.composerSubtitle: Tamara be connections pasand karo, kon kharidnar che ane kon vechnar che e janavo, ane moklo. Banne e confirm karvu padshe.
introductions.partyRequired: Krupa kari ne ek vyakti pasand karo.
introductions.sameParty: Krupa kari ne be alag vyakti pasand karo.
introductions.roleRequired: Krupa kari ne janavo ke kharidnar kon che.
introductions.notePlaceholder: Banne vyakti mate tunki note umero.
introductions.createSuccess: Introduction moklayu. Banne vyakti ne confirm karvanu kehvama avshe.

banners.title: Feed banner
banners.subtitle: Connect feed carousel ma dekhata promotional banners.
banners.empty: Haji koi banner nathi. Feed ma batavva mate ek umero.

form.imageHint: Pahodi chhabi (aashre 4:1). Vadhu ma vadhu 3 MB.
form.title: Title
form.altHint: Screen reader mate chhabi nu varnan.

regularizationSettings.title: Regularization settings
regularizationSettings.subtitle: Tamara workspace mate hajri sudharna requests kevi rite kaam kare chhe te gothvo.

form.maxAttachments: Dar request mate maximum file attachments

tooltips.approvalLevels: Sudhara vinanti amal ma aave te pehla ketla manager e manjuri aapvi jaruri chhe. 1 etle fakt sidho manager manjuri aape. 2 ke 3 reporting chain ma upar na vadhara na star umere chhe.
tooltips.maxDaysBack: Karmchari bhutkaal ma aatla divaso ni andar ni hajri mate j sudhara vinanti kari shake chhe. Udaharan tarike, 30 etle teo fakt chhella 30 divas ni hajri sudhari shake chhe.
tooltips.fallbackApprover: Jyare karmchari no reporting manager set na hoy athva manjuri chain ukeli na shakay, tyare aa vyakti manjuri aapnar tarike aagal aave chhe. Bhalaman: aane HR admin par set karo.
tooltips.maxAttachments: Karmchari sudhara vinanti sathe ketli sahayak files (phota, dastavejo) jodi shake chhe. Vinanti mate file upload band karva 0 par set karo.

salarySettings.ownerOnlyWarning: Fakt workspace owner aa settings badli shake chhe.

disbursement.helperText: Monthly pagar kyare paid tarike record kari shakay (dat. January no pagar 1 thi 6 February vacche). Jemne tame salary access aapo cho te staff mate lagu; owner gme tyare payment record kari shake.
disbursement.salaryDateHint: Aagami mahina ni je tarik sudhi pagar chukvay (1-28).
disbursement.payoutWindowHint: Pagar tarik pachhi ketla divas sudhi chukvani manjur chhe.
disbursement.advanceRequestDayHint: Chalu mahina no chhello divas ke jyare karmachari advance pagar ni vinanti kari shake.
disbursement.advancePayoutDayHint: Mahina no je divas e manjur advance chukvay (1-28). Koi fixed divas na hoy to khaali rakho.
disbursement.advancesGroupHint: Karmchari kyare advance ni vinanti kari shake, kyare pay thay, ane optional limits.
disbursement.advanceRequestWindowHint: Dar mahine karmachari kyare advance pagar ni vinanti muki shake te pasand karo.
disbursement.eligibilityCapsHint: Karmachari advance ni vinanti kare tyare check thata vaikalpik niyantran. Te maryada band karva khanu khaali rakho.
disbursement.maxPercentOfNetHint: Ek advance karmachari na masik pagar na aa percent thi vadhare na hoi shake.
disbursement.maxPerYearHint: Ek calendar varsh ma karmachari vadhu ma vadhu ketli advance vinanti muki shake.
disbursement.minTenureHint: Karmachari vinanti kari shake te pehla (jodavani tarikh thi) ketla mahina kaam karelu hovu joie.

salaryLoss.regularizationWindowHint: Mahina-ant pachhi na divas sudhima hajri niyamit kari shakay, tyaar baad pagar-nukshan nodh thay (default 45).
salaryLoss.enabledHint: Saksham hoy tyare, avaitanik-raja divas niyamitikaran window band thaya pachhi COA khaatama debit nodh kare chhe.

attendanceRules.holidayHint: Saksham hoy tyare, jaher rajao pagar ganatari ma hajar divas ganay.
attendanceRules.weekOffHint: Saksham hoy tyare, saptahik band divas pagar ganatari ma hajar ganay.
attendanceRules.lateMarkHint: Saksham hoy tyare, moda gun dhravta karmachari na masik pagar mathi 0.5 divas katay.

advanceDisburse.splitSumError: Vibhajit rakamo no saravalo manjur rakam jetlo thavo joie.
advanceDisburse.recoveryPlanHint: Aa advance bhavishya na pagar mathi kevi rite vasool thay chhe.
advanceDisburse.bulkPartialMessage: {total} mathi {failed} chukavni nishfal thai. Baki chukvai gayi.

advanceSalary.recoveryNote: Advance aa j mahina na pagar mathi kapai jashe — baki rakam pagar na divse malshe. Monthly hapta joie chhe? 0% loan mate arji karo.
advanceSalary.bulkApproveConfirm: {count} vinanti temni mangeli rakam par manjur karvi?
advanceSalary.bulkApprovePartial: {total} mathi {failed} manjuri nishfal thai. Baki manjur thai gai.
advanceSalary.requestDayClosedTooltip: Advance vinanti fakt mahina na {day}ma divas e swikaaray chhe.
advanceSalary.requestDayClosedBanner: Advance vinanti fakt aa mahina na {day}ma divas e swikaaray chhe.
advanceSalary.amountMustBePositive: Rakam shunya karta vadhu hovi joie.
advanceSalary.approveStepHint: Advance chukavti vakhte recovery plan ane chukvani vigto set thay chhe.
advanceSalary.approveModalDescription: Mang: {requested}. Niche manjur rakam badli shako.
advanceSalary.recoveryPlanHint: Aa advance bhavishya na pagar mathi kevi rite recover thase te set karo. Hammesha vyaj vagar.
advanceSalary.overrideReasonPlaceholder: Surakshit masik limit karta vadhu kem manjur karo chho?
advanceSalary.overrideReasonRequired: Krupa kari override mate kaaran aapo.
advanceSalary.approveBlockedByBreach: Aa plan ochha ma ochha ek mahina ma 50% pagar-deduction cap todine jaay chhe. Masik rakam ghatado, vadhare mahina ma felavo, athva kaaran sathe manjur karo.
advanceSalary.pageSubtitle: Karmachario ni salary advance ni vinantio ni samikhsha karo ane manjur karo.
